[**_We’re running out of time before our midnight deadline. Can you rush a donation of any amount to keep us on track? >>>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56721169/385804433/75460995?amount=10&refcode=20221231.2_DPG_12AT&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2U0NzI4Ny02Nzg5LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDIyNDgzMmU2MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RNxx4l59zlkNekuxyniR3Qgwmhc_L_wzrGaUQNktZ7o=)
We’re sorry to bother you right before the new year but we have a **_critical_** end of year deadline coming up at midnight and right now we’re on track to miss our goal. [**_But, the good news is we’ve crunched the numbers and if we can raise just $2,785 from 18326 in the next few hours, we’ll be back on track. Can you chip in any amount before midnight?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56721170/385804434/75460995?amount=10&refcode=20221231.2_DPG_12AT&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2U0NzI4Ny02Nzg5LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDIyNDgzMmU2MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RNxx4l59zlkNekuxyniR3Qgwmhc_L_wzrGaUQNktZ7o=)

Without the support of this team, we couldn’t have achieved any of our incredible wins this year from flipping seats in the Georgia state legislature to expanding Democrats’ majority in the U.S. Senate. It takes a lot of resources to build and maintain the infrastructure needed to communicate with and organize voters, and we can’t afford to miss a single fundraising goal or we’ll lose momentum.

[**_So, we’re hoping we can count on this incredible team one more time this year. Please rush a donation ASAP to ensure we don’t miss this important end of year goal._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56721171/385804435/75460995?amount=10&refcode=20221231.2_DPG_12AT&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2U0NzI4Ny02Nzg5LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDIyNDgzMmU2MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RNxx4l59zlkNekuxyniR3Qgwmhc_L_wzrGaUQNktZ7o=)

Thanks,
Team DPG

name: Adam Schiff
subject: hey
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
| I really appreciate your support. Truly. And no matter what kind of shenanigans Republicans have in store, I know one thing that I can count on in the New Year — this grassroots team.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=1536%2E5257348%2EAbhWt6)
Hey Derek.
I’m burning the midnight oil ahead of our final FEC deadline of 2022 when the clock strikes midnight. And I wanted to reach out this one last time to ask for your support in these final hours.
What do you say? You can use my secure, personal link to make a small contribution to our campaign: **[secure.actblue.com/donate/dec2022_abs_em](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=dec2022_abs_em.XWEzUA&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20221231_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=4&akid=1536%2E5257348%2EAbhWt6)**
I really appreciate your support. Truly. And no matter what kind of shenanigans Republicans have in store, I know one thing that I can count on in the New Year — this grassroots team.
All the best — and happy New Year!
— Adam
_P.S. I have a New Year's tradition. When the clock strikes midnight, my first words are “rabbit, rabbit,” and that practically guarantees good luck in the new year. Give it a try!_
150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=1536%2E5257348%2EAbhWt6) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=1536%2E5257348%2EAbhWt6)**

Because this is one of your LAST chances in 2022 to to elect state Democrats. Here’s why your support is so important: State Democrats had a HISTORIC midterm election this year, defending every Democratic chamber and flipping four more. But we’re heading into a busy winter full of special elections – starting with an ultra-competitive race in Virginia on January 10th. So state Democrats can make even more gains in 2023 if we all come together at this pivotal moment. If we hit our fundraising goals, we can harness Democratic enthusiasm into another year of wins – expanding our majorities. name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: Our last email of the year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20221231-3756-header&t=1&akid=3756%2E2526796%2EMyKbtj)
We know it’s late so we'll aim to keep this short.
We only have a few hours left until our end-of-year fundraising deadline at midnight. Our campaign is 100% people-powered. In fact, we are the #1 small-dollar funded campaign in Congress. It’s because of contributions from supporters like you that AOC is able to focus on legislating and organizing instead of fundraising.
**But, we’re running up against the clock to reach our 8,000 contributions goal before we begin 2023.**
**If you can afford it, will you contribute $3 or any amount that you can afford to help us reach this goal before midnight? Here’s your personal link to make a donation:**
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20221231?personal=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20221231.n3HhsX&personal=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=em20221231-3756-P_FND_EOQ_GOL&t=2&akid=3756%2E2526796%2EMyKbtj)
Alexandria has been a relentless force for progress since 2018 and has stood with the working families of NY-14 every single step of the way — from supporting Starbucks workers unionizing, to speaking out against monopolistic billionaires, to setting up a ‘homework helpers’ tutoring program for students in NY-14.
Your support today will help keep Alexandria in Congress, speaking out and making change on so many critical issues. But we’re running out of time to reach this goal and it’s going to come down to the wire on whether we reach it.
**Please add your contribution of $3 before midnight. We wouldn’t be asking if it wasn't vitally important to the future of this collective movement:**
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20221231?personal=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20221231.n3HhsX&personal=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=em20221231-3756-P_FND_EOQ_GOL&t=3&akid=3756%2E2526796%2EMyKbtj)
Thank you for your support. This is truly a grassroots-powered campaign and we couldn’t do this work without you.
In solidarity,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20221231?refcode=em20221231-3756-P_FND_EOQ_GOL&t=4&refcode2=3756_2526796_MyKbtj&akid=3756%2E2526796%2EMyKbtj)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20221231-3756-P_FND_EOQ_GOL&t=5&akid=3756%2E2526796%2EMyKbtj)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=6&akid=3756%2E2526796%2EMyKbtj) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=7&akid=3756%2E2526796%2EMyKbtj) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=8&akid=3756%2E2526796%2EMyKbtj)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=9&akid=3756%2E2526796%2EMyKbtj)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=3756%2E2526796%2EMyKbtj)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

name: Chuck Schumer
subject: Friend, you really stood out…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | It's Sen. Schumer.

I'm between meetings, so I'll make this quick: Your name is on our list of inactive Democratic memberships for December, and I need to make sure you activate your membership by tonight’s public, year-end fundraising deadline.

If we want to save the Senate and stop Mitch McConnell **_again_** in 2024, we need to begin laying the groundwork immediately. Voting rights, reproductive justice, President Biden's judicial nominees, and our ultra-slim Democratic majority are all on the line. We can't afford for anyone to sit on the sidelines!

**Your membership has never been more critical. Please, use this custom link to activate right now:**

**[www.dscc.org/202212members#dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://go.dscc.org/go/11383?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20221231-ChuckSchumer-SchumerShortMembershipRF-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20221231-ChuckSchumer-SchumerShortMembershipRF-Pros-sl1&akid=9309%2E9716520%2Eedy8Gt)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jen=20Kiggans?=
subject: Thank you for an incredible year…!
body:
As the year draws to a close, I wanted to reach out and thank you all for your incredible support! | | | | [ ](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=8236db2154&e=4955722b3e)
---
| | |
---
| As the year draws to a close, I wanted to reach out and thank you all for your incredible support! When I set out to run for public office in 2019, I got off my couch looking for another way to serve the country I love. When I launched my campaign for Congress last year, I was on a similar mission. I knew families across Virginia deserved better, and I knew I could take action to help deliver it. Your support and dedication never wavered. I want to thank you for everything you’ve given to my campaign... from putting up yard signs to following our social media to making a donation.... THANK YOU!! Because of you, I am days away from being sworn in as the new Congresswoman from Virginia who is ready to represent our community in Washington... I can’t thank you enough for entrusting me with the job of being your voice in government! Thank you again for being on my team and for allowing me to serve you. It is the privilege of a lifetime! I look forward to next year, and I wish you and your families a happy, healthy, and prosperous 2023!

---
| [Donate >>>](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=d9c733526f&e=4955722b3e "Donate >>>")
---
| With gratitude, Jen
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jeff?=
subject: Happy New Year!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Jeff Warner For Congress
body:
There Is Hope! | | | |
---
|
# **Happy New Year! Vol. 2, #40**
---
| | | 31December22

Dear Friends, **Happy New Year!**
The new year is a great time to reflect upon the past year and to plan for an even better upcoming year.
As we reflect upon the last year, we are so grateful and humbled for your support and kindness. By God's grace, the campaign made history in District 4 and even greater advances will be made in 2023. Remember, there is always hope! Discouragement, demoralization and apathy help guarantee defeat...let's walk by faith!

What will you do to make 2023 your best year yet?
Standing with you,

Jeff

clean_body: There Is Hope! | | | | | Happy New Year! Vol. 2, #40 | | | 31December22 Dear Friends, Happy New Year! The new year is a great time to reflect upon the past year and to plan for an even better upcoming year. As we reflect upon the last year, we are so grateful and humbled for your support and kindness. By God's grace, the campaign made history in District 4 and even greater advances will be made in 2023. Remember, there is always hope! Discouragement, demoralization and apathy help guarantee defeat...let's walk by faith! What will you do to make 2023 your best year yet? subject: 𝐓𝐨: Democrat Raphael Warnock!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
CONGRATULATIONS! >>
| **BREAKING: Senator Raphael Warnock WINS Georgia Runoff, protecting Senate Majority for Democrats** **Listen, this is a HUGE victory for Democrats and our Senate majority, so we 're sending Warnock a letter from our top grassroots supporters to congratulate him!** [**We 're sending this letter to his office at 8 am tomorrow - so we only have 55 more signature spots available! SIGN NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37802?t=6&akid=5942%2E878179%2EP9bSSZ) [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37802?t=7&akid=5942%2E878179%2EP9bSSZ) | [Donate $3 to sign the letter now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37802?t=8&akid=5942%2E878179%2EP9bSSZ)
---
TO: Senator Raphael Warnock
FROM: A grateful Democrat
Subject: CONGRATULATIONS **_Dear Sen. Warnock - CONGRATULATIONS!_**

**We cannot begin to tell you the sense of relief we had when we found out you soared to re-election victory!**

Georgia is a key battleground state that was absolutely _essential_ for Democrats to hold and expand our fragile Senate majority.

**We know fighting against MAGA extremist Herschel Walker and the MAGA mob 's vicious attacks wasn't easy -- especially in such a close race.**

**So we just wanted to show our thanks and send our congratulations!** [**I hope you know that there are MILLIONS of us across the country that stand with you. That 's why I'm signing this card and chipping in $3 to Voter Protection Project to congratulate you on this outstanding victory and to continue to elect incredible Senate Democrats like you »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37802?t=9&akid=5942%2E878179%2EP9bSSZ) [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37802?t=10&akid=5942%2E878179%2EP9bSSZ) | [Donate $3 to sign now »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/37802?t=11&akid=5942%2E878179%2EP9bSSZ)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=5942%2E878179%2EP9bSSZ). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=5942%2E878179%2EP9bSSZ).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=5942%2E878179%2EP9bSSZ) to request fewer emails. name: Joe Biden
subject: Will you chip in a $7 donation before the end of the year so we can gear up for future elections and elect Democrats up and down the ballot?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
Before we enter 2023, will you support the DNC with a donation? | |
---
Derek -- I woke up this morning grateful. Grateful for this team, for the American people, and for the progress that we’ve made together. You’ve heard me say it before, but I’ll say it again now: _I’ve never been more optimistic about the future of our nation._ **I mean it.** This year we secured our Senate majority and lost fewer seats in the House of Representatives than any Democratic President’s first midterm election in the last 40 years. And we had the best midterms for governors since 1986. Voters made clear that they wanted to elect leaders who would address the climate crisis, gun violence, and protect personal rights and freedoms. But we’re not done yet. We have a whole heck of a lot more to do to build a better America. **This team and the DNC have done a world of good to elect Democrats who are committed to making America work for everyone. clean_body: Before we enter 2023, will you support the DNC with a donation? | | Derek -- I woke up this morning grateful. Grateful for this team, for the American people, and for the progress that we’ve made together. You’ve heard me say it before, but I’ll say it again now: I’ve never been more optimistic about the future of our nation. I mean it. This year we secured our Senate majority and lost fewer seats in the House of Representatives than any Democratic President’s first midterm election in the last 40 years. And we had the best midterms for governors since 1986. Voters made clear that they wanted to elect leaders who would address the climate crisis, gun violence, and protect personal rights and freedoms. But we’re not done yet. We have a whole heck of a lot more to do to build a better America. This team and the DNC have done a world of good to elect Democrats who are committed to making America work for everyone. And they’re coming up on their final deadline of 2022. We’ve got to keep up our work of electing Democrats at every level and building a better America -- and the DNC’s work is integral to it. I really appreciate your support this year, Derek. God love ya. Joe Joseph R. Biden, Jr. President of the United States Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, **. If you're ready to elect Democrats in all 50 states, territories, and D.C., . Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, ** , and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Crunching the numbers
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

We wanted to make sure you saw our email earlier today from our finance
director.

We’re facing our end-of-year deadline in just a few hours and whether or
not we’re able to fully fund our 2023 budget depends on if we’re able to
reach our $75,000 end-of-year goal.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/124107?refcode=em20221231-26834&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=26834%2E1203867%2EHgVaQG ]Please make a contribution of $3 before midnight to help
us continue our work to take on the Democratic establishment by recruiting
and electing progressive community leaders to Congress.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/124107?refcode=em20221231-26834&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=26834%2E1203867%2EHgVaQG ]Contribute $3

Thank you for your support and we hope you have a safe and happy New
Year’s.

— Team JD

--------Forwarded message below--------

Peter, this
wasn’t the email I had hoped to send to you today.

It’s my job to keep track of Justice Democrats' fundraising and make sure
we raise enough each month to cover our costs and plan for the long-term.
But, I have some tough news, this year we raised 17.3% less over ActBlue
than in 2021.

As a result of this dip in our numbers, it’s crucial that we reach our
$75,000 end-of-year fundraising goal. We don’t have corporate PACs or
billionaire donors to turn to if we fall short.

Imagine the Democratic Party without AOC, Jamaal Bowman, or Cori Bush in
Congress. Justice Democrats recruited each of these leaders to run and win
and we’re building the infrastructure for even more grassroots candidates
to do the same.

We can’t continue to fall short of our fundraising goals. The success of
our 2024 Candidate Recruitment is on the line and if we fall short of our
end-of-year goal, we’re going to need to take a look at budget cuts for
2023.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/124107?refcode=em20221231-26834&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=26834%2E1203867%2EHgVaQG ]So with that in mind, will you contribute $3 right now?
Every single donation will make a difference.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/124107?refcode=em20221231-26834&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1040&akid=26834%2E1203867%2EHgVaQG ]Contribute $3

We don’t take this work lightly — we know what we’re up against, and we do
everything in our power to set our candidates up for success. There’s no
other organization that does what we do. But our work is only possible
because of your grassroots support.

More soon,

Julia Eddy
Finance Director, Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1041&akid=26834%2E1203867%2EHgVaQG ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1042&akid=26834%2E1203867%2EHgVaQG ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20221231-26834-footer&t=1043&refcode2=26834_1203867_HgVaQG&akid=26834%2E1203867%2EHgVaQG

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1044&akid=26834%2E1203867%2EHgVaQG

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: The fight continues in 2023
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Progressives will continue to lead the way in 2023.
#
Peter, before the New Year, I wanted to reflect on where we are and where we still need to go:
This year, gun violence recently surpassed car accidents as the leading cause of death for American children.
**Don't tell me we don’t need an assault weapons ban.**
This year, the student debt crisis reached $1,959,574,218,160.
**Don't tell me student debt cancellation is not essential.**
Since 2018, the 39 largest companies in America have paid ZERO in taxes, despite bringing in $122 BILLION in profits. All while 60% of workers report living paycheck-to-paycheck
**Don't tell me we can't close the loopholes, level the playing field, and tax the rich so they pay their fair share.**
As we head into the minority, Democrats will be a line of defense against House Republicans' worst ideas. But in addition to being an opposition party, we will also be a proposition party that brings people in and continues to deliver for the people whenever possible — on issues like student debt, gun violence, and more.
[**If you're ready to keep up the fight for our progressive agenda, chip in $3 or any amount you can afford toward our $900,000 fundraising goal for 2022 coming up at midnight TONIGHT.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/22255?c0=20221231.QpXiZg&refcode=em20221231-2-2009&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2009%2E420207%2EEwA6Mi)
**[Chip in $3 »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/22255?c0=20221231.QpXiZg&refcode=em20221231-2-2009&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=2009%2E420207%2EEwA6Mi)**
This year, Democrats delivered. This year we passed the largest investment into climate action in our country's history with the Inflation Reduction Act.
We passed a government funding bill that invests in working families! It increases funding for child care, Head Start, & pre-K for low-income families, expands access to affordable housing, and provides workplace protections to pregnant people.
**No matter how far we’ve gotten, we have many pivotal fights that will continue in 2023** — from gun control, to student debt cancellation, to protections for working families, and more. **With Republicans controlling the House on top of it all, I need you by my side.**
Before tonight, we have to close a fundraising gap in order to raise $900,000 for the year. [**Can you contribute whatever you can to show the strength of our movement for bold, progressive change?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/22255?c0=20221231.QpXiZg&refcode=em20221231-2-2009&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=2009%2E420207%2EEwA6Mi)
Talk soon (in 2023),
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20221231-2009-footer&t=22&refcode2=2009_420207_EwA6Mi&akid=2009%2E420207%2EEwA6Mi)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=23&akid=2009%2E420207%2EEwA6Mi)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=2009%2E420207%2EEwA6Mi)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

body:

We are just HOURS away from our final deadline of the year – but we’re still $12,807 short of our must-hit goal! That means Democrats in every corner of the country need to mobilize NOW if we’re going to stand a chance against GOP gerrymandering, combat voter suppression, and flip statehouses from red to blue. But the moment we announced our 7X Match offer, something happened that we never saw coming: Democrats know this isn’t an opportunity that comes around often, so they’re pouring in gifts to make their voices heard for the LAST TIME this year. name: Glenn Grothman
subject: We're looking ahead to 2023...
body:
[](https://grotg-glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-fsnll-jyltijykjd-r/) Happy New Year, friend!I'm looking back on this year and what it meant to me. While 2022 was certainly a year that brought many challenges, it also provided many things for me to be grateful for.I'm blessed to be entrusted to serve Wisconsin's 6th Congressional district for another term, and I'm excited for the opportunity to work with a Republican majority in Congress. As my team and I prepare to move on to 2023, we wanted to close out this year with a final end-of-year fundraising push to help us start off the New Year with momentum!Your financial support will help me continue to bring conservative Wisconsin values to DC and fight for proven small-government solutions, secure our southern border, rebuild our economy, and make America prosperous again.[**Will you donate $20.23 or more to help us raise $2023 before the New Year?**](https://grotg-glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-fsnll-jyltijykjd-y/) [I'll Chip in $20.23 Right Now!](https://grotg-glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-fsnll-jyltijykjd-t/) [I'll Contribute Another Amount](https://grotg-glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-fsnll-jyltijykjd-i/) Thank you for all your support this year, and I can't wait to see what we're going to accomplish together next year!Sincerely,
**Glenn Grothman** [](https://grotg-glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-l-fsnll-jyltijykjd-d/) | Glenn Grothman for Congress
P.O. Box 1215
Fond du Lac, WI 54936 You are receiving this email because you expressed an interest in Glenn Grothman [Unsubscribe](https://grotg-glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail20.com/t/t-u-fsnll-jyltijykjd-h/)

| Fellow Patriot,
**I’m officially challenging Kevin McCarthy as Speaker in the new Republican Congress.**
If you agree a CONSERVATIVE should lead us in Washington... not another RINO Establishment hack like McCarthy...**[I need you to help us mount a pressure campaign.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99207%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9gb0XUsxoSd5OxoQJbXWpw&sysid=1)**
My efforts to win over Congress are FAR more powerful if they know that VOTERS want a conservative in charge.
**[Pitch in just $30 to turbocharge our emergency efforts to break the Establishment and elect a CONSERVATIVE Speaker of the House>>](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99208%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wPUiSAE0gRUhqhlF%2fEENfQ&sysid=1)** | | | | [FIGHT WITH $30](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99209%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uhASSwtrpo5R3PcQCRsq0Q&sysid=1)
---
**Kevin McCarthy does NOT have the values, the backbone, or the courage** to stand up to Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer.

Like most Establishment Republicans, he sees conservative voters like you and me as the real enemy...and he’ll stab us in the back every chance he gets.

For 2 years, I served as Chairman of the House Freedom Caucus... the most powerful and successful congressional bloc of conservatives ever. **I figured out exactly how the Establishment operates and exactly how to defeat them at their own game.**

I’ll make you this promise right now: I will NEVER betray conservative voters, surrender my principles, or stop fighting for what matters most.

We won the House in November because the American people voted to STOP Biden’s radicalism and BREAK the Establishment’s stranglehold on this nation. **McCarthy won’t fight for us...so we’ve got to do it ourselves.**

But we only have a couple weeks before Congress picks our new Speaker. **[We need you to LEAD this fight and power our pressure campaign.](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99200%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SS3ifqt0NLKznbtNEKhASw&sysid=1)**

body:
Food prices have skyrocketed, and according to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried abo
# #1 Item to Hoard In 2023
Food prices have skyrocketed, and according to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z72q5gfmbcot0s4b7gofsq92e07mssdunkgplb8o_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cljm0o72cph2bs). Currently 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.

# These Survival Food Kits Are
Famous for Selling Out...
Now They're Back in Stock!
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z2s4otk1kgk9e1l5hnpu8ks9rkg9u9uhrqg9ou10_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cljm0o72cph2bs) **These best-selling kits are back in stock...** and you'll get loaded up with [**FREE GIFTS**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zlhdjvbog58hn0vltrp1sj68vh5ft10v0e9i19io_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cljm0o72cph2bs) when you get yours today. It starts with great savings on the 3-Month Kit. Just look at all you get with this deal: [**You get $273 worth
of FREE gifts!**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zct053pkg9b767qa1osicqkesa39acf81mmvpi70_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cljm0o72cph2bs) **FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... **FREE Bonus #2:** You'll get a **Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault** with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** You'll also get an **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF your next purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... **FREE Bonus #9:** **You get FREE Shipping and Handling on your entire order!** It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. The best part is... You'll have the peace of mind and security that comes from having your very own survival food stockpile. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zncdq8hcf31lq5dgd3i8mr3qu8hoehrkgsqs6vcg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cljm0o72cph2bs) First, you get their **no-questions-asked 365-Day Double Satisfaction Protection**. That way there's no risk for you. Second, if you open your 4Patriots food **anytime in the next 25 years** and find that despite following storage instructions your food has spoiled, you can return it and they will replace it with something of equal or greater value. That's how confident they are that this food will remain delicious and nutritious for the next 25 years. **[[Back In Stock!] Grab Your Food Kit& All Your FREE Gifts Now](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z0q6q625qtufv3pbql7s1jtcb3tu6bfu9oj5qlso_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cljm0o72cph2bs)** You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't [**take action**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zn9eb7vpt3mos8sg32cqbkpgbfn3sj3a78mh7arg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cljm0o72cph2bs) to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry, and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just [**imagine how much better you'll feel right away**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z695d72mtificq0sra8live7nqkpv87b2uj8j06o_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cljm0o72cph2bs). When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. **As it stands today, it's every man for himself.** In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. **[[Back In Stock!] Grab Your Food Kit& All Your FREE Gifts Now](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z2oqe85m5guureccs9jmhssuqish492f4nbctnr0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cljm0o72cph2bs)** To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters | | **Rory H.** I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things.

This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great.

I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed.

name: Kari
subject: Take this from me.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Save Arizona Fund Inc
body:
| [ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44247%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dhzI0cHOL5RQqCBh7ZCLVg&sysid=1)

---
Friend,

I will be the first to tell you there were plenty of times I thought about giving up and throwing in the towel.

**At this point -- that’s just not an option. **

Our case proved, without a doubt, that not everything was as it seemed during Arizona’s November election.

Now, the far-left political operatives and Fake News media are hoping this recent ruling will end my fight once and for all.

**They are dead wrong. I’m not going to stop fighting.**

I promise you -- I will appeal this case and continue our struggle to secure our election until my very last breath.

**However, I need to know -- do I have your support?**

| [**YES, YOU HAVE MY SUPPORT!** ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44248%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8mCf7WVlSLQ%2flJYsDLY9Ew&sysid=1)

name: Brent Bozell
subject: The Washington Post is falling, Friend
body:
I just read one of the best things of 2022 – The Washington Post, which lost 500k subscribers this past year, announced upcomi
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ze750eo5gfl2i9vmhntd5122dbf2ee8f4u4l4d48_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cljm0o76c3h2bs)
Friend,

I just read one of the best things of 2022 - _The Washington Pos_ t, which lost 500k subscribers this past year, announced upcoming layoffs.

Do you know what this means, Friend?

**We 're winning!**

My name is Brent Bozell, Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC).

MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing activists pretending to be journalists and stopping them from using the media to push their socialist agenda.

**When the MRC was founded in 1987, over 75% of Americans trusted the media. Since then, MRC has successfully SHATTERED America 's belief in that trust-- over 90% of Americans state they DO NOT trust the left-wing media anymore. **

Now I need you to help us destroy them for good. That's why I've set a goal to raise $7,500 by the end of the week.

[_**Can you help MRC hold the left-wing media accountable for their corruption and lies? Click here to send a gift of $10, $25, $50, or any amount today and**_ _**help us DESTROY the media**_ _** >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zu9u0is4c1ac517kpk2o4k26veeiaohaun6q9p08_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cljm0o76c3h2bs)

I will not stop my mission until the average voter sees corporate journalists for the traitors they really are.

They've used their power to sway our elections.

**During the 2020 and 2022 elections, the media manipulated MILLIONS of voters through their radical political agenda.**

They refused to give airtime to important arguments of the Republican
campaign -- both pro-Trump and anti-Biden -- and ran a constant stream of negative material on President Trump.

Millions of voters cast their ballots knowing only what the media permitted them to know about the candidates.

**The leftist media have the power to change our elections. And if we don 't stop them, they will do it again!**

[_**Help MRC show voters that corporate journalists are now traitors to America >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhomfnvq2d1hbpkbul73j6850vsjmpbjcfal1icg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cljm0o76c3h2bs)

Here's how MRC exposes the left-wing media:

1. **MRC monitors and clips videos of all news content from major networks, social media accounts, and cable outlets. **

We have over 850,000 hours of video stored on secure servers covering every nightly broadcast and more going back to 1987.

2. **My team and I analyze this content and identify fake news stories, lies, and left-wing media bias. **

3. **MRC 's team exposes these lies by forcing the media to report the story, sharing their reports on social media, and telling the truth. **

The Media Research Center also owns some of the largest social media pages in the conservative movement so that they can share these stories with supporters.

Your generous gift helps us expose the radical leftists who have hijacked the media for their socialist agenda. Click below to donate today.
[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfkq74oosgtoce1q2lcbender0j1utk7f09ta39g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cljm0o76c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zi1h3v2i3uc2bmr4b0q4ibk08anrv44aneodid6g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cljm0o76c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z376c88r43ndpfhvg7hkf8lfotfrl1rpof0esqk8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cljm0o76c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zp364kvs4dtc791auoo01g4o8v61ln6qaqhq7u30_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cljm0o76c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z1fvcjc49fru95uhhlek5l07fo3mi7q7oe763bs0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cljm0o76c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ze4k2mgcr69oguh6ckqtrk3qg34k2sh96sf1dct8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cljm0o76c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zotjl4q5qklp451nu9cuk857vvrc5l2n6s9k1k88_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cljm0o76c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zt5sig94plm1opb59h01117afsdrovj8r9hbq02o_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cljm0o76c3h2bs)
[_**Donate $5,000 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgta0hsnus0d1779365uhnk24vbon42id5rj9il0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cljm0o76c3h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsru8pq7mofj1hs170jkh13cvuhjemogefemh36o_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cljm0o76c3h2bs)

Thank you,

Brent Bozell
Founder and President of MRC

name: Kari Lake
subject: Take this from me.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Save Arizona Fund Inc
body:
| [ ](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqvoissm1g3sa2o88pinsrr4n016ouugjtklc958_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cljm4or4c5h2bs)
---
Friend,

I will be the first to tell you there were plenty of times I thought about giving up and throwing in the towel.

**At this point -- that's just not an option. **

Our case proved, without a doubt, that not everything was as it seemed during Arizona's November election.

Now, the far-left political operatives and Fake News media are hoping this recent ruling will end my fight once and for all.

**They are dead wrong. I 'm not going to stop fighting.**

I promise you -- I will appeal this case and continue our struggle to secure our election until my very last breath.

**However, I need to know -- do I have your support?**

| [**YES, YOU HAVE MY SUPPORT!**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2znof94b3j47kfmbturi0e3kklj0q15n0s2q0rub0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cljm4or4c5h2bs)

Best,

Kari Lake

Paid for by Save Arizona Fund Inc.

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: Why I created the BLEXIT Foundation
body:
This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztqm2qn5mmel4lns6e1pm92a9632sqa3ocnd1148_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cljm0o76c9h2bs)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjve2vohl1c31a622s6avtalfcfokokg1n1136v0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cljm0o76c9h2bs)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zojfsmfv5sbbcn2rfkb9r9fsdmpa84u7jvf5ec78_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cljm0o76c9h2bs)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj31tn96nssiik6p19rc4ojd3tj925a27n2vsm68_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cljm0o76c9h2bs)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbf1i5p4sk9l7q35k1ad0cu423rtbbkhj18a9f10_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cljm0o76c9h2bs)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqbe783cfr63rf4dnkqq8s0cmdd9fis0kl15k0o8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cljm0o76c9h2bs)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1a30a764tksdh9p9kisi8ph9urfp47lqqrjmcl0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cljm0o76c9h2bs)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zstuv0q9sg0khgluq7h72l9orbpgs5uuh7r1ebvg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cljm0o76c9h2bs)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd3t7ks8gctnr1osi0kf36nfmav00cjr2h112g58_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cljm0o76c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9irrgi217kuok9v0k7ms67r2bllnkeufvsjvl1o_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cljm0o76c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn6mrgccmlng7ih3o7pa9mvli63f6df7p6lp3k48_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cljm0o76c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlknr68kusl3v4ajnfu3ketfckvvbvfv0m3stnj0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cljm0o76c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z91v8g098cae6l7cblmq44m9s4vaulg8sfvihrdo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cljm0o76c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvesbjq76smpkkmh9lct4ottj2degt1m1fkas9q8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cljm0o76c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zej3parr88mg4ua1oonp5m91v343m7p1ncdubmn8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cljm0o76c9h2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztp0fvcvl5u5qq96f6n6ujgmouvrb4amai3f17ig_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cljm0o76c9h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9tg4oj1u1cu7flm1jp9813781nufb8odihv78io_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cljm0o76c9h2bs)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zni2higmg4b793ksrkdvlt4r0ol55d4gv9bm00v0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cljm0o76c9h2bs)

Thank you, Friend.

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Action News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americanactionnews.com/prefs/9z2ztqlvn9ln70c8tplctio92uo49e6m5spmkg0rd70).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z750fekmgbkskr279hbimj12l8p1p4o99oplbfeo_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7c9imeo30sph649fg)

Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore. The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. This is personal to me. I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: This is my last message to you before you close this email. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Action News, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

subject: Happy New Year from Rob Ortt 🎉
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB ORTT FOR SENATE
body:
January 1st, 2023
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YUitXVz-TrjRk4bZFyAtyvh7uiK08yM8c23twH-bsPK7OSxsPsA0d0S7xZhBXcGI5kFfTi7yZoVzwadd800OKTu7d9DISWzIcpQcEOEgfHpgDJCcLC9PaqIqG72TmXBGfacmvCieP65dBbmQNMDeZA==&c=H-sEipTFLnoC1hb7jhSzrQ2ILf-ftIxgjodlgBZyNSqf937PTb2V0A==&ch=rdmjNfnKg6oAltgKZqbFBZJutXB3Gnt1dILRIMcBhCgRrT0fc7Ey_Q==)
---
| |
---
|
---
| Dear Friend,
So much can happen in a year. As we close out 2022 for good, we can reflect on all we've learned and take that with us full force into this new year. I'm thrilled to be leading Our Senate Minority Conference into the 2023 Legislative Session. Our Conference is stronger than ever, and I look forward to continuing the fight for a safer, stronger, and more affordable New York. I want to thank the service members and volunteers who have been working around the clock while Western New York battles the effects of this recent storm. May we always remember that we are stronger when we work together. From my family to yours, I wish you blessings in the New Year.
Sincerely,
---
|
---
| |
---

subject: #1 Item To Hoard in 2023
body:
Food prices have skyrocketed, and according to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c7529%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=Lfk6Rs%2bHHpoRNe7EXG1lbA&sysid=1)
# #1 Item to Hoard In 2023
Food prices have skyrocketed, and according to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78577%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hcsBRFSlbJmbiJpFQbiGag&sysid=1). Currently 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.

# These Survival Food Kits Are
Famous for Selling Out...
Now They're Back in Stock!

of FREE gifts!**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78570%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7acrFK%2bWY%2fkR1ZRArGhGaQ&sysid=1) **FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... **FREE Bonus #2:** You'll get a **Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault** with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** You'll also get an **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF your next purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... **FREE Bonus #9:** **You get FREE Shipping and Handling on your entire order!** It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. **[[Back In Stock!] Grab Your Food Kit& All Your FREE Gifts Now](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78571%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VaJXA%2fx607DJyhGcq4IKHA&sysid=1)** Isn't that great? The best part is... You'll have the peace of mind and security that comes from having your very own survival food stockpile. [**You'll even get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan - with no interest!**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78572%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GukaBalj1h1RhUydJ8VP7A&sysid=1) On great-tasting, survival food protection without the sticker shock. **Look, this food tastes homemade.** It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78573%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mR29LezcTksrNmLttgetEQ&sysid=1) First, you get their **no-questions-asked 365-Day Double Satisfaction Protection**. That way there's no risk for you. Second, if you open your 4Patriots food **anytime in the next 25 years** and find that despite following storage instructions your food has spoiled, you can return it and they will replace it with something of equal or greater value. That's how confident they are that this food will remain delicious and nutritious for the next 25 years. **[[Back In Stock!] Grab Your Food Kit& All Your FREE Gifts Now](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78571%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VaJXA%2fx607DJyhGcq4IKHA&sysid=1)** You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't [**take action**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78574%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ao7lGkRlGllqaWWFTihXmw&sysid=1) to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry, and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just [**imagine how much better you'll feel right away**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78585%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wPWQ3%2fHDoGA6V4lSVClxtQ&sysid=1). When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. **As it stands today, it's every man for himself.** In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. **[[Back In Stock!] Grab Your Food Kit& All Your FREE Gifts Now](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c78571%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=VaJXA%2fx607DJyhGcq4IKHA&sysid=1)** To your survival,

Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters | | **Rory H.** I was surprised to find that the densely packed packages were easy to prepare and were tasty as well. I definitely recommend having survival food on hand for the times when 'life' happens while we are planning other things.
---|---
| **Billy H.** Received my food kit, and I was able to make the potato soup on my cookstove. Just needed boiling water. Gave it a good stir and let it simmer. When I opened up the pot, it smelled so good. You can see the chunks of potatoes and carrots in each bite you take. It's a good soup.
---|---
| **Kevin S.** The 72 hour kit is a perfect starter kit for any scenario. Put one in your car, work bag, in your house or RV. If you want to start preparing safe food, this is where to start.
---|---
| **Carol B.** I have been iced in this weekend. I thought I would try my potato soup. To my utter delight, IT WAS DELICIOUS. Thank you for such a wonderful product and the peace of mind it brings.
---|---
| **Ken K.** I am not a full-blown survivalist. I am not an idiot, either. I have been through enough in my life and have seen friends who have been through an emergency situation. Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal.
---|---
| **Justin A.** My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great.
---|---
| **Gary M.** I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed.
---|---
| **John H.** We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when."

Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like... Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired... Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick... Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished... Well, no need to worry anymore. Friend,

I will be the first to tell you there were plenty of times I thought about giving up and throwing in the towel.

**At this point -- that's just not an option. **

Our case proved, without a doubt, that not everything was as it seemed during Arizona's November election.

Now, the far-left political operatives and Fake News media are hoping this recent ruling will end my fight once and for all.

**They are dead wrong. I 'm not going to stop fighting.**

I promise you -- I will appeal this case and continue our struggle to secure our election until my very last breath.

**However, I need to know -- do I have your support?**
