name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0370%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=driXZ7243Mmu%2bxL7dutbnQ&sysid=1)
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44243%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8tOc7NgSgPqrETKIc44L5w&sysid=1)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America’s black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation’s mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44244%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GvkoqWO7I30KSsunQs089g&sysid=1)

**_Now I’ll share my story_ ... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how “helpless” I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We’re taught to believe we’re victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I’ve dealt with racism... _**I’ve even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44355%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=z6eBM4OBvMAbPGSdwtfIrg&sysid=1)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I’m not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don’t want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a “think tank”, but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting “DO-tank”. We’re doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation’s values, what we’re doing to reach Black communities, and what we’re fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly “fighting for minorities” are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT’s efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44356%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pOgq5pEJLT%2b%2fChGyD6rXTw&sysid=1)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44357%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DpKo0CbiTop7LUkwbBLK5g&sysid=1)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we’re actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44358%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sma%2baeu%2f37A76oaPiwMigg&sysid=1)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44359%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FFm3wfsiUnqlGDBA8mEdLQ&sysid=1)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we’ve allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We’re hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We’re not just preaching to the choir, and these aren’t boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT’s events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44350%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qCZzCPxaCg0%2ba7lm8Nc62g&sysid=1)

What does “BLEXIT” mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I’ve copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44351%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=e7dK0RfEfOV%2bzrpB4Iz5uQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44352%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=k6uvj%2baNnsWJUxna9oAAdg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44353%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eSTQExmh9tpMk%2fflJHk9zQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44354%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eezG9UmQEpflcQv5qPua5Q&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44365%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=n4iliEmdD6kexGZt%2bht%2ffg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44366%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=P%2b%2bb%2bmqopRc8aKFeDCiBbw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44367%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=q0u8rMJMPL3iNOQIRaEv7w&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44368%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IqTPbBMfQTEy2IjUAJGfyA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44369%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NPJVEt22%2b5PT0kA7GRxfdA&sysid=1)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44360%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=O4Ijr%2fAAb4NvSt%2fmW9Ds1Q&sysid=1)

Thank you, Friend.

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0370%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=driXZ7243Mmu%2bxL7dutbnQ&sysid=1)_

clean_body: This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Friend, This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation. For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop. In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America’s black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. Now I’ll share my story ... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities. Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how “helpless” I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking. We’re taught to believe we’re victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals. This is WRONG. I’ve dealt with racism... I’ve even received death threats. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable. But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up. I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. I am breaking the rules. It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... I’m not doing that. You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country. So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don’t want to miss). When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a “think tank”, but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting “DO-tank”. We’re doing things no other organization in the country is doing. Here are the BLEXIT Foundation’s values, what we’re doing to reach Black communities, and what we’re fighting for: School Choice: Often, the people allegedly “fighting for minorities” are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools. The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. Criminal Justice Reform: The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities. Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message. Entrepreneurship: I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire. BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we’re actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we’ve allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore. The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We’re hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We’re not just preaching to the choir, and these aren’t boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. What does “BLEXIT” mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. This is personal to me. I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I’ve copied below to donate today: This is my last message to you before you close this email. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Up to 94% cheaper than a Tesla battery
body:
Every single Tesla EV is powered by a lithium-ion battery that has transformed Tesla from the laughingstock of the auto industry
| Dear Reader, Every single Tesla EV is powered by a lithium-ion battery that has transformed Tesla from the laughingstock of the auto industry into the biggest car company in history. [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zddjfgmrrk03aoclj365kfln2pfkqpp1a6lqb3ng_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cljm2ob0clh2bs) But new sources agree that there is a "breakthrough" new battery technology that "could eat lithium’s lunch." Powermag called it "the trillion-dollar holy grail" of battery technology. A $130 trillion revolution in energy is coming and one tiny company behind this new battery technology trades for around $4. It’s such a huge opportunity for these billionaires -- Bill Gates, Jack Ma, Richard Branson, Michael Bloomberg, and Jeff Bezos -- are all backing this tiny company. Because this new battery can store energy up to 94% cheaper than a Tesla lithium-ion battery. **[Click here to check out the full story.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvl86a1mi6efd65ic2jnv7hqrkqhn3b24lhi6r3g_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cljm2ob0clh2bs)** Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, _Rogue Economics_
---

name: American Action News
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivatin

| | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7nmo0mqkuel2fqq4q4v1od4p9bdphesmod66798_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cljm6oj6c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7vic30snbubn7t7vh2u13bhckiosurvhnc3su18_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cljm6oj6c3h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3bge4cdpsod8ge75tmep0cgjhcgq2faj1cmd628_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cljm6oj6c3h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9a5hk60sbqrkkgc3i446jemgvun6md7umc6v998_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cljm6oj6c3h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

subject: #1 Item To Hoard in 2023
body:
Food prices have skyrocketed, and according to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried abo
# #1 Item to Hoard In 2023
Food prices have skyrocketed, and according to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9tpq4n3ht89th5pp29q8gnu8jigq1s4a04s37cg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cljm6oj6cjh2bs). Currently 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.

That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... **FREE Bonus #2:** You'll get a **Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault** with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** You'll also get an **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF your next purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... **FREE Bonus #9:** **You get FREE Shipping and Handling on your entire order!** It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. **[[Back In Stock!] Grab Your Food Kit& All Your FREE Gifts Now](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7iac9pg9snj8cqohtj7sbm4t6haifo77vfv5k30_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cljm6oj6cjh2bs)** Isn't that great? The best part is... You'll have the peace of mind and security that comes from having your very own survival food stockpile. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zopvunof86djcb17ot0m1h9nfk5uls4c371dpbm8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cljm6oj6cjh2bs) First, you get their **no-questions-asked 365-Day Double Satisfaction Protection**. That way there's no risk for you. Second, if you open your 4Patriots food **anytime in the next 25 years** and find that despite following storage instructions your food has spoiled, you can return it and they will replace it with something of equal or greater value. That's how confident they are that this food will remain delicious and nutritious for the next 25 years. **[[Back In Stock!] Grab Your Food Kit& All Your FREE Gifts Now](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zj9majs8lrigju3rmg7ier2n1e5rkjd5crm1its8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cljm6oj6cjh2bs)** You need to get 'er done today. Why? Because if you don't [**take action**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2za9fhkldml8npan9hv1gk7h7h8nitoq7f1358ua0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cljm6oj6cjh2bs) to get your food stockpile today, you'll be in the same boat as the brainwashed masses who think "everything is fine." And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry, and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just [**imagine how much better you'll feel right away**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsqeh9ecle47pbgtssejq9jv22n3ulmkf33vfcr8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cljm6oj6cjh2bs). When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. **As it stands today, it's every man for himself.** In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. That's why I want you to have the same peace of mind that I do. **[[Back In Stock!] Grab Your Food Kit& All Your FREE Gifts Now](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcs46jcgih1hg0uj9eibpg3kork63c9cqmcmf0c0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2cljm6oj6cjh2bs)** To your survival,

Frank Bates

---|---

---|---

Save up if you have to, but get at least a month's supply. It tastes good. Although if it's a dire of an emergency, you will be happy to eat anything. IF you have something to eat for your family. We made some of this product, and had family and friends over for them to taste. They all agreed they didn't think anything would be this good, and they will be ordering. Just do something. You can't miss out on this deal.
---|---
| **Justin A.** My wife and I tried the food and we were both surprised about how good it tasted and how satisfied it made us feel afterwards. It feels good knowing that I can provide for my family if a crisis arose and I intend to get more in the future. Also the shipping and customer service has been top notch. This is probably the cheapest survival food I have found, and the company is great.
---|---
| **Gary M.** I actually had lost my job and was homeless for a while. I dug into my food supply, and I cannot fully describe how delicious and easy to prepare everything is. I felt like I was eating like a king. I am going to stock up again as soon as I settle into my new job. Everyone should participate with this company. You will not be disappointed.
---|---
| **John H.** We're in Florida and have made many preparations for the aftermath of a possible hurricane. While we are thankful that Florida has not been hit in several years, it gives us great peace of mind to know we have our 4Patriots kit stashed away, knowing it's not a case of "if" but "when."

subject: New Year, big changes ahead
body:
Peter, As we head into 2023, I pray you are having a joyous season. For those across the nation dealing with disastrous storm damage, I pray for your safety.

name: Your America
subject: Access “C.S. Lewis on Christianity”
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7637%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=ZefyzUaZdBJKG2Us9uQgcA&sysid=1)

| | | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99218%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=42lpzZ40PLTxePpWW%2bwJmQ&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99219%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=o71tPv1GFicXaOhBgcXebQ&sysid=1)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99210%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PY9QwffQrAwECaYOeHvsdw&sysid=1)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99211%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=O7xx0GLbdQ3InUDaEkW6mg&sysid=1).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

He is the author of Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis and After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man, and the co-editor of The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns! This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity. That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with . Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

| | | | | Peter, **_In less than two weeks Virginia could begin the process of making abortion illegal._** _**This isn't hyperbole. Very few people are talking about it, but on January 10th there's a crucial special election in Virginia to fill an open state senate seat. **_ Why is this so important? Because, in 2019, riding a wave of lies about "CRT," anti-chioce zealot Glenn Youngkin was elected Governor. Also, Republicans took the state house and came within a vote of the state senate. In other words, a slender majority in the state senate is the last bulwark vs Republicans turning women into second class citizens. [**_This one state senate seat will make all the difference in the world to over 8,600,000 Virginians. Can you join us right now in making Virginia safe for Virginia women, by giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to Aaron Rouse for state Senator, a man who'll protect women's rights and fight the retrograde Youngkin agenda?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T322cda7d-18fa-4150-ac2d-97a689496670/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Democrats have a 21-19 lead in the state senate, but one Democrat, Joe Morissey, refers to himself as pro-life and supports Republican efforts to ban abortion._ **_Democrats, fortunately, have abortion-rights defender Aaron Rouse running._**

name: 4Patriots
subject: #1 Item To Hoard in 2023
body:
Food prices have skyrocketed, and according to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried abo
# #1 Item to Hoard In 2023
Food prices have skyrocketed, and according to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp3sfdf8eqons53c5anfoagedk9lgfpm598korrg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2clge8or4c9h2bs). Currently 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.

# These Survival Food Kits Are
Famous for Selling Out...
Now They're Back in Stock!
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh8bmu6i6oidhs0gjf3l307gfftkkn1mmho3dk9o_rp22sh2s8i66pr2clge8or4c9h2bs) **These best-selling kits are back in stock...** and you'll get loaded up with [**FREE GIFTS**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrv8g5gif2qnc327mo813ch0gges69hlb9q6i5jo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2clge8or4c9h2bs) when you get yours today. It starts with great savings on the 3-Month Kit. Just look at all you get with this deal: [**You get $273 worth
of FREE gifts!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zofpanj86sq0hfhtcg9603v74uhpf4jcorchjfu8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2clge8or4c9h2bs) **FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... **FREE Bonus #2:** You'll get a **Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault** with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** You'll also get an **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. name: Brent Bozell
subject: The Washington Post is falling, Friend
body:
I just read one of the best things of 2022 – The Washington Post, which lost 500k subscribers this past year, announced upcomi
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfjc08n3p3esspkdgf4mf9fkurt86qdbm9pucko8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2clge8or4c9h2bs)
Friend,

I just read one of the best things of 2022 - _The Washington Pos_ t, which lost 500k subscribers this past year, announced upcoming layoffs.

Do you know what this means, Friend?

**We 're winning!**

My name is Brent Bozell, Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC).

MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing activists pretending to be journalists and stopping them from using the media to push their socialist agenda.

**When the MRC was founded in 1987, over 75% of Americans trusted the media. Since then, MRC has successfully SHATTERED America 's belief in that trust-- over 90% of Americans state they DO NOT trust the left-wing media anymore. **

Now I need you to help us destroy them for good. That's why I've set a goal to raise $7,500 by the end of the week.

[_**Can you help MRC hold the left-wing media accountable for their corruption and lies? Click here to send a gift of $10, $25, $50, or any amount today and**_ _**help us DESTROY the media**_ _** >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zr40feam784lt9kk3pga6vk2babd2iioj2p5dgdg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2clge8or4c9h2bs)

I will not stop my mission until the average voter sees corporate journalists for the traitors they really are.

They've used their power to sway our elections.

**During the 2020 and 2022 elections, the media manipulated MILLIONS of voters through their radical political agenda.**

They refused to give airtime to important arguments of the Republican
campaign -- both pro-Trump and anti-Biden -- and ran a constant stream of negative material on President Trump.

Millions of voters cast their ballots knowing only what the media permitted them to know about the candidates.

**The leftist media have the power to change our elections. And if we don 't stop them, they will do it again!**

[_**Help MRC show voters that corporate journalists are now traitors to America >>>**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkq3dpatstjg8ddqd62ejpn7oe49roj2up2b2080_rp22sh2s8i66pr2clge8or4c9h2bs)

Here's how MRC exposes the left-wing media:

1. **MRC monitors and clips videos of all news content from major networks, social media accounts, and cable outlets. **

We have over 850,000 hours of video stored on secure servers covering every nightly broadcast and more going back to 1987.

2. **My team and I analyze this content and identify fake news stories, lies, and left-wing media bias. **

3. **MRC 's team exposes these lies by forcing the media to report the story, sharing their reports on social media, and telling the truth. **

The Media Research Center also owns some of the largest social media pages in the conservative movement so that they can share these stories with supporters.

Your generous gift helps us expose the radical leftists who have hijacked the media for their socialist agenda. Click below to donate today.

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways.
| | This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z25qnns2g955fg8l6eetv223oa99o8gmts0pk438_rp22sh2s8i66pr2clgecob4cjh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zfnm3thig8s0djccad13qo1qtqasvq4lqo6pamio_rp22sh2s8i66pr2clgecob4cjh2bs)**[The Second World Wars.”](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z9kbp7ucl1ok6siatvvhu6hcd4l38e6jrdgtduv0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2clgecob4cjh2bs) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
---
| [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zmin1pdvu8quj4eug1cgfqseuvqck6gl9ethgrl8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2clgecob4cjh2bs)
---
| | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD today: _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z7a0ljaujkjedpm0kncm94l534s7plilnh1pthng_rp22sh2s8i66pr2clgecob4cjh2bs)_ Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

**[_🚨BREAKING NEWS 🚨_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99214%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6YkCOiaRtic%2bUcE6814j8g&sysid=1)**

**[_ARIZONA JUDGE RULES AGAINST KARI LAKE’S ELECTION LAWSUIT_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99225%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rtI1GNKP3foonrGDOVP0kw&sysid=1)**

Patriot,

We have an urgent update from Team Lake.

An Arizona judge has ruled against Kari’s election lawsuit, but this trial was never the end all be all of this fight. This was always just the beginning.

**We will APPEAL, and we will bring this lawsuit all the way to the steps of the Supreme Court if need be.**

Kari’s finalizing our plans with the most formidable team of election lawyers this country has ever seen. [**BUT we’re going to need your help, Friend, if we’re going to be able to finish this fight.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99226%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nPVD1aQynjorFiC0IJzmDQ&sysid=1)

This judge may not have ruled in our favor, but we have faith in the American justice system. It’s not too late to make things right.

[**According to our team, if every one of our supporters can contribute just $10 to Kari Lake’s fight to secure our elections and ensure the disaster that happened in Arizona is NOT repeated, our team will have the funds needed to bring this case to the Supreme Court.**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c99227%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2AxXIwJZzqugnWg18828sg&sysid=1)

name: Andy Biggs
subject: My plan to defeat McCarthy and restore conservative power in Congress >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biggs for Congress
body:
How I'm going to make it happen
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z6mj92s2mj0ca3onvdhqaqvcbva3u6mq9f52n5tg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2clge8or4cdh2bs)
---
| Fellow Patriot,
**I’m officially challenging Kevin McCarthy as Speaker in the new Republican Congress.**
If you agree a CONSERVATIVE should lead us in Washington... not another RINO Establishment hack like McCarthy...**[I need you to help us mount a pressure campaign.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z0im0da3mbmrbosf7s75pn1nel1qpd9n59ck3n70_rp22sh2s8i66pr2clge8or4cdh2bs)**
My efforts to win over Congress are FAR more powerful if they know that VOTERS want a conservative in charge.
**[Pitch in just $30 to turbocharge our emergency efforts to break the Establishment and elect a CONSERVATIVE Speaker of the House >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zbaim3c508igstma27a4h9f5n77d98p2m299srs0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2clge8or4cdh2bs)** | | | | [FIGHT WITH $30](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zmgacnng19hslc21i47v7e1u188bmp815ggt71i0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2clge8or4cdh2bs)
---
**Kevin McCarthy does NOT have the values, the backbone, or the courage** to stand up to Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer.

Like most Establishment Republicans, he sees conservative voters like you and me as the real enemy...and he’ll stab us in the back every chance he gets.

For 2 years, I served as Chairman of the House Freedom Caucus... the most powerful and successful congressional bloc of conservatives ever. **I figured out exactly how the Establishment operates and exactly how to defeat them at their own game.**

I’ll make you this promise right now: I will NEVER betray conservative voters, surrender my principles, or stop fighting for what matters most.

We won the House in November because the American people voted to STOP Biden’s radicalism and BREAK the Establishment’s stranglehold on this nation. **McCarthy won’t fight for us...so we’ve got to do it ourselves.**

But we only have a couple weeks before Congress picks our new Speaker. **[We need you to LEAD this fight and power our pressure campaign.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2znmlvdsg809nnt1b3jjtvt8fghei7ihm026apsng_rp22sh2s8i66pr2clge8or4cdh2bs)**

**[Just $30—or anything you can afford—will make sure Congress knows the stakes and feels the heat. Come through for this nation with an emergency gift >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zu79e5m0mhvtig006smbr4iv0aovepl90ci1j6t8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2clge8or4cdh2bs)**

---
| | | [FIGHT WITH $80](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zbic433gtgue0kl6im1g8ttasq2n1t4qcb5sl4oo_rp22sh2s8i66pr2clge8or4cdh2bs)
---
Yours in Freedom,

Andy Biggs

clean_body: How I'm going to make it happen | | | | | | | | | | Fellow Patriot, I’m officially challenging Kevin McCarthy as Speaker in the new Republican Congress. If you agree a CONSERVATIVE should lead us in Washington... not another RINO Establishment hack like McCarthy... My efforts to win over Congress are FAR more powerful if they know that VOTERS want a conservative in charge. | | | | Kevin McCarthy does NOT have the values, the backbone, or the courage to stand up to Joe Biden and Chuck Schumer. Like most Establishment Republicans, he sees conservative voters like you and me as the real enemy...and he’ll stab us in the back every chance he gets. For 2 years, I served as Chairman of the House Freedom Caucus... the most powerful and successful congressional bloc of conservatives ever. I figured out exactly how the Establishment operates and exactly how to defeat them at their own game. I’ll make you this promise right now: I will NEVER betray conservative voters, surrender my principles, or stop fighting for what matters most. We won the House in November because the American people voted to STOP Biden’s radicalism and BREAK the Establishment’s stranglehold on this nation. McCarthy won’t fight for us...so we’ve got to do it ourselves. But we only have a couple weeks before Congress picks our new Speaker. | | | | | | | | | Yours in Freedom, Andy Biggs Republican Congressman, AZ-5 | | | | Paid for by Biggs for Congress If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Briefing, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Kat Cammack
subject: Happy New Year!
body:
2023 is finally here, and while we celebrate with our friends and loved ones, I wanted to reach out and wish you a Happy New Year!
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y1fsNqu2_6aRYvHVA71kOPJvaPx31Bqt3DPFfcZgdp-NlrJMqs1Z_6U8UqFUkpedA4tGk9QccdpKckzNAnOgoYZqm6ihY9xEobl0ppJNpFcJglZMdow-Smq56uCUEyH_qn90VMHRQh6JDNYJlxqAbn3DAB8UnvMT&c=NV-deiat6laF3e4mrooryJbu-sPVgIHMGzThIsbvG5Emsz49Qwiu0Q==&ch=cippzdYETO-7KCHFRjM9_kby-iCJfxRqDSKNYrR0Eid6s1KLf9Bwyw==)
---
| Friend
2023 is finally here, and while we celebrate with our friends and loved ones, I wanted to reach out and wish you a Happy New Year!
As we get ready to face the coming changes, I want to thank you for supporting me this last year. Your support allowed me to stay in the fight for the future of our nation, and I can't wait to continue putting Florida and America First!
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Y1fsNqu2_6aRYvHVA71kOPJvaPx31Bqt3DPFfcZgdp-NlrJMqs1Z_6U8UqFUkpedA4tGk9QccdpKckzNAnOgoYZqm6ihY9xEobl0ppJNpFcJglZMdow-Smq56uCUEyH_qn90VMHRQh6JDNYJlxqAbn3DAB8UnvMT&c=NV-deiat6laF3e4mrooryJbu-sPVgIHMGzThIsbvG5Emsz49Qwiu0Q==&ch=cippzdYETO-7KCHFRjM9_kby-iCJfxRqDSKNYrR0Eid6s1KLf9Bwyw==)
---
| Today is a day for reflection, and as we prepare new resolutions and reflect on old ones, I hope you can look ahead to what's in store for 2023.
Have a Happy New Year,
---

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Hope for the new year!
body:
| | | Happy New Year!
---
**Thank you for all of your input, ideas, and work last year!** While we have challenges awaiting us in this new year, I’m just so grateful to know you are in the fight. Don’t forget, our country has been through so much before. And yet, during those times of hardship and oppression, Americans never gave up. And that’s what you and I are going to do as well – never give up! The Tomb of the Unknown American Revolution Soldier in Philadelphia is a wonderful reminder of our shared American heritage and culture**. As you begin this new year, remember where we came from, that we will persevere, and that you are not in this battle alone.**
---
---
God Bless America and Happy New Year! Jenny Beth Martin
---
| | |
---

name: American Defense News
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zpoail9ukp2hd0a9nidmf17hbrav54pbe06a33r8_rp22sh2s8i66pr2clgeaoj2c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zpi74eu0nklelnf8qa0fqkcgi7n8kvhous1c5da0_rp22sh2s8i66pr2clgeaoj2c9h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zo1pjc9sqf2kuo8leeuakvij2oc5g49ifp6i8lvg_rp22sh2s8i66pr2clgeaoj2c9h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: American Update
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0371%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=zJkQWBY4dZ%2fEsZd45bBosA&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44370%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IyeuuNP1P%2bCBGPBeOLYzzA&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44371%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eYUsI9%2bWP%2b3OwJHItr8vFw&sysid=1)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c44371%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=eYUsI9%2bWP%2b3OwJHItr8vFw&sysid=1)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

subject: #1 Item To Hoard in 2023
body:
# #1 Item to Hoard In 2023
Food prices have skyrocketed, and according to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a2ffe1052fae49d8b4a2126bbac336ab&_e=_YGVkVdFWRY5Fdo9PpgWSwfT9zAq_ED1_XcsDqsOJPpk7tuEpQyqIFLr3D0rq6na_2mhQTezC__eVLvRsf4MKMxc__yp2Nc5hICLQjEc8UFfgvcf_iJp_hONjP3te7_NmONo8_WG7pVp3bzlSNaqy9i8Iv1UjFM-a75TwGtrt_dIihskHnNqrm8lb4hh-LMPCOmaGhf0pWbEONPoAD0cPItEUQquwzjO_s_hYldNW-x5jWb-pvDFY61d-qoLa2ai5BTx_Q7pDBraIyROFngF3rRE45TtdQ6AUzWZzyPwLLs%3D). Currently 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.

# These Survival Food Kits Are
Famous for Selling Out...
Now They're Back in Stock!
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a2ffe1052fae49d8b4a2126bbac336ab&_e=_YGVkVdFWRY5Fdo9PpgWSwfT9zAq_ED1_XcsDqsOJPpk7tuEpQyqIFLr3D0rq6na_2mhQTezC__eVLvRsf4MKMxc__yp2Nc5hICLQjEc8UFfgvcf_iJp_hONjP3te7_NmONo8_WG7pVp3bzlSNaqy9kDDGABedniSGXmX9runQ7DN6B13dqr4EUC7-t8BP7j_1SGl3MyI1KyST1M_OGGc0WyqhOsG3rawyTp9azHgQfl7jKEf_fhqLbuZlWYrcHpK3MjRnIXLv3IDROFvADhcnKxcXYDi-yNUuS_I1ztEQ8%3D) **These best-selling kits are back in stock...** and you'll get loaded up with [**FREE GIFTS**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a2ffe1052fae49d8b4a2126bbac336ab&_e=_YGVkVdFWRY5Fdo9PpgWSwfT9zAq_ED1_XcsDqsOJPpk7tuEpQyqIFLr3D0rq6na_2mhQTezC__eVLvRsf4MKMxc__yp2Nc5hICLQjEc8UFfgvcf_iJp_hONjP3te7_NmONo8_WG7pVp3bzlSNaqyyNXy_CPVAMhPxJvfQKRwRLBkvpdMZ5htwyEGTik8iZX_mLqe0UKg37FBoZ2dOxvUnrVSqtuWBBvpT2PWSeM_7YvXNf56YY_HBoE9SCUbxTnLn1dl1gs65hwSVbAd4n93HV1j4CVWbJgd2pZtawcgq8%3D) when you get yours today. It starts with great savings on the 3-Month Kit. Just look at all you get with this deal: [**You get $273 worth
of FREE gifts!**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a2ffe1052fae49d8b4a2126bbac336ab&_e=_YGVkVdFWRY5Fdo9PpgWSwfT9zAq_ED1_XcsDqsOJPpk7tuEpQyqIFLr3D0rq6na_2mhQTezC__eVLvRsf4MKMxc__yp2Nc5hICLQjEc8UFfgvcf_iJp_hONjP3te7_NmONo8_WG7pVp3bzlSNaqy68w8KoU9qn153FS7-_KA6NZi92xP1KZgmDkpUjb6xUX4WdCM5gjISD8z_dm-XY7mV5d8yjzL_wIRfK0zaq9vhJx2i15gWhuthkOWTMrGT7siSMIhh5cG3AhqZEl1uLN1-LYzA0Sx3PkNmTbbbkTTzI%3D) **FREE Bonus #1:** because they are so popular and a true foundation for your preparedness plan, they're going to give you _**2**_ of their popular 72-Hour Survival Food Kits when you get your 3-Month Kit today. That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... **FREE Bonus #2:** You'll get a **Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault** with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** You'll also get an **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF your next purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. body:
# #1 Item to Hoard In 2023
Food prices have skyrocketed, and according to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7c140489607b41a6b8c077875d7c1673&_e=M_mOSwlT6KhR_3XQfT4-SB9PLNuYRde2JhuVUAAp_61y0KPGk4_CI1ORaTgMdGEVmDM9qu6HHUzF0xmuBWOdegbvvkBhieasTrN26XqCDCvb6uNYVd65DkSdN0m1RpikaTf_SUHyIJbtSAlUyTMo-DMRu7CXodBG7B1ZZ_vQFGCrALNagVdf2JQijm537OxjjYz314Ijf4X0-C2-T_OvrShivZDpLvR_IBv1Scl1w9-IlatEgIFBPyAIXMHmKJFS_Om8TE0o1jeqeO5a_kVJnFxZd9HcyPbMtBssoKkQ-tU%3D). Currently 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.

body:

Peter,

Happy new year!

In 2022, we went against all odds and secured the Democratic majority in the Senate because we worked collectively. By continuing our work to implement positive change and progress in our community, we have the chance to make 2023 an even better year.

Your support is what keeps me going and I look forward to continuing to advance our shared priorities.

Wishing you a joyous new year,

Mike

Friend,

I will be the first to tell you there were plenty of times I thought about giving up and throwing in the towel.

**At this point -- that's just not an option. **

Our case proved, without a doubt, that not everything was as it seemed during Arizona's November election.

Now, the far-left political operatives and Fake News media are hoping this recent ruling will end my fight once and for all.

**They are dead wrong. I 'm not going to stop fighting.**

I promise you -- I will appeal this case and continue our struggle to secure our election until my very last breath.

**However, I need to know -- do I have your support?**

| [**YES, YOU HAVE MY SUPPORT!** ](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=6cd7a37bad05406fb791f978f4ff1786&_e=62vlRklycQMSa5BSy2IQcJs25Ax_eHhXY317s1pbcfsETSnObEixTybg-TF4K-CQuH0JNBkjg5JMicSI55Z5043Yd0QWRnRm_tvecmj0bJkSp4t2QwmOP0QnHfL9kI-BFMxVOjtDS9xhKt11O5y2ntV8MeE5Ah6_hod7klIOQX_5pV8Umb-LYl1__sQY0OhdDc6Y6Ebk_q8uSTHmBrP9aDy4cAp_HMNh3yBNAGJBDB3UxgaCC0m_71bYyuuE1RgSb9Ev6Jo_Tc4jiiQOMKZ-obL2N7nhSFn8q-7Qbfj3Wd9a4MxlvTA7Mq--CpsR02qsSA86Q0uST34EzA-2rLKIX_PsDTeEqYtXk1h4fZkXYhZTf51q2XEl7DJV5itC_MOOmaMRPUFlKtjeBa96CmI0vfAm3eFl-Dp9UPIC4lGrMAfVIw_1rtZOerxFryUPEVxg46701QQWlQfYHeHfLSHliurysGVVFikFzcGAirraQ4nSefGmwP0UWtRoIHB5uIhFRtjrYUHl7jeP5MTHhucin0tZohr9ojTBp1jGeAYQNdl_n69wCJ7mGsCtzKxbEDRe)
