name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: Why I created the BLEXIT Foundation
body:
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=8205e92f06c741a897db83f4518f1cb1&_e=SZ7aPLNZn3VqN9hQpvmF6f2UlCfzS2xmUa3GtiuRezkz0As9sPwgivS1D9VDA9oFTsOQf5ViQRGt-hJpK6E4v5B_ZkvVk5ExTW6Igbuq9f7zd8hRVqOSl-9HYCMZDWLTF_o2PwUlYrzNiksn-FevyuSjaz6h1aQJs6_WD6IceEk3km-JvgxzMp0z6MEk2zIYHNtaKpmLOHtoRljcgstMJceW1_GFPjEwjYtGDXSgoeXie8lJ7XMCA1fObmaSdIQZd7PabmZxPcogk5ZKmNx1CKBhG6LVjiU3MLwFjSpbLRY%3D)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America’s black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation’s mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=8205e92f06c741a897db83f4518f1cb1&_e=SZ7aPLNZn3VqN9hQpvmF6f2UlCfzS2xmUa3GtiuRezkz0As9sPwgivS1D9VDA9oFTsOQf5ViQRGt-hJpK6E4v5B_ZkvVk5ExTW6Igbuq9f7zd8hRVqOSl-9HYCMZDWLTF_o2PwUlYrzNiksn-FevyidWs0IwfuKtcEF2r8Ci__w8r5ep6e2ra1846n1o9f_ElsL49pOBaSRdbpLDnEGnnC_iVppDhOp4S97vbwJLnKyhsbvYRAH8hE-mVDg5mgEZrNY-jZFdQw2NYaxT-R61zdHkqBg7-oU4ZH5c4OchPts%3D)

**_Now I’ll share my story_ ... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how “helpless” I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We’re taught to believe we’re victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I’ve dealt with racism... _**I’ve even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=8205e92f06c741a897db83f4518f1cb1&_e=SZ7aPLNZn3VqN9hQpvmF6f2UlCfzS2xmUa3GtiuRezkz0As9sPwgivS1D9VDA9oFTsOQf5ViQRGt-hJpK6E4v5B_ZkvVk5ExTW6Igbuq9f7zd8hRVqOSl-9HYCMZDWLTF_o2PwUlYrzNiksn-Fevyhyq0Jidp7VrO9qe2r0DsMA5SM528iqEWxoe8PDJGocMy6MSICapzIbXKxjFfrUZhEHu1rqLPn2uw_ZAaCa87UGGcYG5yfsXBQY_fzIKo1LNBRtwW-5fyIyqlmkgZ5x7ZDIDlBrJoP6Y9xySRxo2gMM%3D)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I’m not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don’t want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a “think tank”, but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting “DO-tank”. We’re doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation’s values, what we’re doing to reach Black communities, and what we’re fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly “fighting for minorities” are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT’s efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=8205e92f06c741a897db83f4518f1cb1&_e=SZ7aPLNZn3VqN9hQpvmF6f2UlCfzS2xmUa3GtiuRezkz0As9sPwgivS1D9VDA9oFTsOQf5ViQRGt-hJpK6E4v5B_ZkvVk5ExTW6Igbuq9f7zd8hRVqOSl-9HYCMZDWLTF_o2PwUlYrzNiksn-Fevyp0LbJijH1D68DjOyiRVebNPVl9qulVC7s092Fp_uLlL2I6lMJ298OzmPmskeV6hiBxKEs2vCg7mY3eIuLihvY26g0rXDUUS5Cl-k-TYsuRzKsDpOw5HHSYYVNMW3J4ecqQa8vrRA8RHOnKhcu6Bmvg%3D)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=8205e92f06c741a897db83f4518f1cb1&_e=SZ7aPLNZn3VqN9hQpvmF6f2UlCfzS2xmUa3GtiuRezkz0As9sPwgivS1D9VDA9oFTsOQf5ViQRGt-hJpK6E4v5B_ZkvVk5ExTW6Igbuq9f7zd8hRVqOSl-9HYCMZDWLTF_o2PwUlYrzNiksn-FevygEHYh1XRJ2RpxmX1q79RZRAmM9TVxwAKT3gPXN9fK0qrilHFiqh00zbJehALmwSyIViraGRXclSwu98usRMexwcwHgeH7-Es9nzxs5Ts-PHQZg-vk-nXnuA8wO8s6YxAFeDpyxuxpiMxAGekZB8vAI%3D)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we’re actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. clean_body: Friend, This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation. For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop. In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America’s black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. Now I’ll share my story ... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities. Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how “helpless” I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking. We’re taught to believe we’re victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals. This is WRONG. I’ve dealt with racism... I’ve even received death threats. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable. But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up. I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. I am breaking the rules. It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... I’m not doing that. You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country. So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don’t want to miss). When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a “think tank”, but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting “DO-tank”. We’re doing things no other organization in the country is doing. Here are the BLEXIT Foundation’s values, what we’re doing to reach Black communities, and what we’re fighting for: School Choice: Often, the people allegedly “fighting for minorities” are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools. The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. Criminal Justice Reform: The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities. Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message. Entrepreneurship: I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire. BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we’re actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we’ve allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore. The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We’re hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We’re not just preaching to the choir, and these aren’t boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. What does “BLEXIT” mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. This is personal to me. I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I’ve copied below to donate today: This is my last message to you before you close this email. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

**At this point -- that's just not an option. **

Our case proved, without a doubt, that not everything was as it seemed during Arizona's November election.

Now, the far-left political operatives and Fake News media are hoping this recent ruling will end my fight once and for all.

**They are dead wrong. I 'm not going to stop fighting.**

I promise you -- I will appeal this case and continue our struggle to secure our election until my very last breath.

**However, I need to know -- do I have your support?**

Our case proved, without a doubt, that not everything was as it seemed during Arizona's November election. Now, the far-left political operatives and Fake News media are hoping this recent ruling will end my fight once and for all. They are dead wrong. I 'm not going to stop fighting. I promise you -- I will appeal this case and continue our struggle to secure our election until my very last breath. However, I need to know -- do I have your support? | Best, Kari Lake Paid for by Save Arizona Fund Inc. Sent to Conservative Liberty Wire subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[**BUT we 're going to need your help, Friend, if we're going to be able to finish this fight.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=41f77a07dce345e0b3312df4a6a2f15d&_e=8OMCm3J_zjzPvfuzRhDIFqHOBUCpZnVdWzcZCGSPozHzQcCXiikUSVPzEYVxgBJ_gYOK8kI1ulX3WyiP0bQUPL046YbGwHXWG04IRsqvE0llHFu4Fc5Sn2mysu8v7z_daF9wlnYVzOmBATKHi8yvkkiKf9oZhC4hVQFxJ13WFh_AO4aP3rLxFcBix25BaN38HSkcnNs3GfM2jDt5S_uRMVyvIQFhaOZmt5UswLIwYXCXlgPyLOeWbbcshFsdXvdrjk2OdkC6gzMQTlX5DMl7qA7Mfg8Agq9-ak-GLmBMcnqB92Yt2c8-2T8U_tyVIJ4LHjstgysd8VloSejORsyTMECoT8vNSPlLiCatVmtUrzBO_RksVHf-0UiRzaLXThnv9MWGRLGQ_ZSMBYrrcCI-10vPM7NYoNcJbRqZScsQbjynaNKgu9KvNYHBnpJ5gY3gTGKPPz4ulbPqeCtsCvw923MP3Cy8SDc11vpf3OKokq6wU65mkBHjX6IRRPlViNj4GPgCtZa2QDVdALVTopJd3eGNrKIzfnr5Z6wn523sZu8%3D)

clean_body: 🚨 🚨 🚨 | Patriot, We have an urgent update from Team Lake. An Arizona judge has ruled against Kari's election lawsuit, but this trial was never the end all be all of this fight. This was always just the beginning. We will APPEAL, and we will bring this lawsuit all the way to the steps of the Supreme Court if need be. Kari's finalizing our plans with the most formidable team of election lawyers this country has ever seen. This judge may not have ruled in our favor, but we have faith in the American justice system. It's not too late to make things right. | Best, Team Lake Paid for by Save Arizona Fund Inc. Sent to Defend the Constitution subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Full Mag News
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1e62df1339084e43980b3fba8acab04d&_e=Gve49r47ELFahPaY-gv16s_9Ft23xWCiHcmw7I4UWX_nZcZ3bEnVAzFR1pagw0n5yeQlj9YMyjYcz3QEjFj-KKH8DK2MJg50tk1SaRNWXLvRzmyQZEaIc4eYUM8sHc-Ad7642dbKnDhhM8DpFBrxHBk6xuq-mI2CnCCQj1gV--T2Zxo8qFReqx4PymQORq2am6el66HQp0aElz0q4VAb8421ET6MHIqjBcz5tRw9WdvyT_yrq6B46eiW19OwrEL4a4IEi9hwMtdzV5Wsb7A8dceSEInRnB87esOrPKQnBDwtwZjAtxak-1D0vZF9GqJ6r_bD5DwuLJbmqNGyIg4YQ-LHDB77qBmk8Pg2kKMkwFloMRxGQ_opVbevP5XBU_mJewHw87KK9JQOyW9ZrYiiQQ%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1e62df1339084e43980b3fba8acab04d&_e=Gve49r47ELFahPaY-gv16s_9Ft23xWCiHcmw7I4UWX_nZcZ3bEnVAzFR1pagw0n5yeQlj9YMyjYcz3QEjFj-KKH8DK2MJg50tk1SaRNWXLvRzmyQZEaIc4eYUM8sHc-Ad7642dbKnDhhM8DpFBrxHBk6xuq-mI2CnCCQj1gV--T2Zxo8qFReqx4PymQORq2am6el66HQp0aElz0q4VAb8421ET6MHIqjBcz5tRw9WduykRxHw6UmrB2F_NnJRWsgewsTRLMhkbTG26NjYvBdzcxdjWLlyNoHA8aaJfhu3cw6-_OdO9JgYYZ7SJy-O_JQOfhr-cwWETuK64qmf9krXN6dW9_TL0zEgcYMR75BQkv9TC0EYH_ECiOp8Bdm01BErX7-bj_60q7Zec5_O1Hlmw%3D%3D)** For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1e62df1339084e43980b3fba8acab04d&_e=Gve49r47ELFahPaY-gv16s_9Ft23xWCiHcmw7I4UWX_nZcZ3bEnVAzFR1pagw0n5yeQlj9YMyjYcz3QEjFj-KKH8DK2MJg50tk1SaRNWXLvRzmyQZEaIc4eYUM8sHc-Ad7642dbKnDhhM8DpFBrxHBk6xuq-mI2CnCCQj1gV--T2Zxo8qFReqx4PymQORq2am6el66HQp0aElz0q4VAb8421ET6MHIqjBcz5tRw9Wduo7okXtaH_e9V-w3Vq4YrTQXFszp6K6pgXTU9bN3lzrIYhXAYoGSuHmpJFJ4rQh76Ytm5LnwbffoR23hR13Hi6QyBrUEwaGSXGHuy2eUmMKutrGqfAewY67dju-_JouKjVQVP7lWacipathvUI-K8APwyhswsNNHPVauzh2FnDeA%3D%3D)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Sent to Full Mag News subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[**unsubscribe**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=1e62df1339084e43980b3fba8acab04d&_t=f4pLG61_SOxjKwpdo3H7KbtSw_ufSfY_pSedm_vkNLclGGU3WtsdMGSgei31UlJ6NZZlLvWk5mAmbDWUBb-j5nQxshqUtYO4AWXZ8bK8hxVUVbzXbEMi3o6kas3FwBWAY-SoTXBofJlgd5qGdt4bfBHt66duQU9deUHv7aNYEwc%3D)

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;" Reaching over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Sent to Full Mag News subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Happy New Year, Peter!

Today is not only the first day of 2023 - it's also Derek's 49th birthday.

name: Sign the Petition (via Left Action)
subject: Tell the Media to stop giving Republicans a free pass on lies and extremism
body:
| | | | |
---
| | | [Tell the Media to stop giving Republicans a free pass on lies and extremism](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1afa7061-f3e8-4474-a456-3d1d22cbbeca/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[ ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcc3db1d3-1178-436a-9d53-87c484e109d0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta567d5e0-c5f3-4dd6-9808-4c671c75d20e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | (Want to unsubscribe? See link below) It's so commonplace that we've come to expect it — **[reporters refusing to plainly call out lies and extremism from Republican leaders](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3a3fb228-0ecb-4296-ba0c-34bfa8ee6b99/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9).**

Obvious lies are softened to "debatable assertions" or some other weasel phrase. And wildly extreme policies and actions from Republicans are paired with slightly left of center ones from Democrats to create false "both sides do it" stories. **We saw the damage this did in 2016 ( "but her emails"), when Trump got away with an unprecedented number of lies, and [we're already seeing it as we approach 2024](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9743ade0-442b-43f3-8fff-4b18ad56cffb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9).**

Yes, some media sources are better than others, but the vast majority regularly give Republicans a free pass. **They are simply too timid to report accurately on what the Republican Party has become.** And this has to stop. And we need to call them on it every single time.

[**Add your name: Tell the Media to stop giving Republicans a free pass on lies and extremism (and keep on telling them every time you see it).**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdda991c6-1861-46fe-8d86-46d20377adeb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [SIGN YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta633dfa6-26cc-494d-a9c2-a9fd899ac857/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Thank you, Left Action
---
|
---
| | | | | **Other things you can do:**
* Follow us on [Facebook](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdff699b3-8e88-4a52-bdeb-d7bef1ffa66c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) and [Twitter](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te71114e5-2725-4368-9221-b0ffcb046cac/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Go here for more actions you can take](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2ce09360-165a-4a85-9adf-ae5081f8eb9a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
* [Help us out with a donation](https://default.salsalabs.org/T72fb9991-f1df-4f60-a720-dc3c083bd3b7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching and engaging with the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. Can you help us keep holding our elected officials accountable to their voters?
body:
Democracy never sleeps
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. It's been a helluva year, and we're so grateful to everyone in the Blue Amp Action community who takes action to make this a better country and world. Sometimes it can all seem so overwhelming, but we do what we can here to play whatever role we might in leaving things better than we found them. I figured with all the times we've asked for donations to others, I'd make this one solely for Blue Amp Action. It’s expensive running such a large and growing list, with everything from office space to technical equipment and email storage taking a bite out of us every month. _It costs around $4,000 every month just to cover our email database._ **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **[So, If you like the work we do, feel we're contributing something important in this existential fight for our democracy and a much more perfect union--which we hope you do--would you consider giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford to Blue Amp Action?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te8a721f1-b022-4537-8fa8-0ca9af835e3e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**

name: Hendrell Remus
subject: Thank you for everything
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Tennessee Democratic PartyTennessee Democratic Party
body:
Peter,

We wanted to be among the first to wish you and those you love a happy and healthy new year! Each January brings us a moment to reflect on the past year and look to the future. 2022 has had its challenges, but it’s clear that we have created momentum that we’re excited to build upon in 2023.

2022 has been a year of development. President Biden has made great strides in moving our country forward, and I’m wrapping up my first election year as Chair of the Tennessee Democratic Party. We built up an organizing team that contacted hundreds of thousands of voters and conducted digital outreach that reached millions. Despite working against the worst gerrymandering our state has ever seen, our democratic incumbents were reelected and we strengthened our caucus with new members.

The challenges have been real, but we have persevered, and will continue to do so. I’m incredibly proud of every Tennessee Democrat and what we’re building. This upcoming year is filled with possibilities. We plan on building on our progress and working toward a successful 2024. Together, we have the power to go forward boldly — for our communities, for Tennessee, and for our country.

It’s up to all of us to build the Tennessee we know is possible, leaving no one behind. Thank you again for being the backbone of our success.

Onward to a promising 2023, Happy New Year!

Hendrell Remus
he/him
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]The Tennessee Democratic Party works to elect Democratic candidates who fight for working people. Can you help Take Back Tennessee by giving monthly?

DONATE MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty]

Paid for by the Tennessee Democratic PartyTennessee Democratic Party
319 Plus Park Blvd
Nashville, TN 37217
United States

body:
| | | Peter, On this New Year’s Day, I just wanted to show my true appreciation and thank you sincerely for all of your support.

I would not have the strength to keep fighting for the conservative cause without all of my loyal, conservative supporters, and the support of my amazing family.
---
---
So on this beautiful New Year’s Day, I just wanted to wish everyone a blissful and happy holiday, and a great start to the New Year. Again, thank you all greatly for your support.

God Bless,

Senator Josh Hawley

Patriot,

We have an urgent update from Team Lake.

An Arizona judge has ruled against Kari’s election lawsuit, but this trial was never the end all be all of this fight. This was always just the beginning.

**We will APPEAL, and we will bring this lawsuit all the way to the steps of the Supreme Court if need be.**

Kari’s finalizing our plans with the most formidable team of election lawyers this country has ever seen. [**BUT we’re going to need your help, Friend, if we’re going to be able to finish this fight.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=45e11edd573243d7b2dd616230b1792a&_e=ONp_zaaVBbxRwYnTCqkZD3TCR5gNQh28hVDe7Wnqnz8eAF2hAL9AOv6u1AIHDs_qLIqdgH0TDPDDmRSqV_ZxxxZJjhmOWQaQjE3ATwYsdhzDOV9ZgReHI84Pu3jY5dot38mK2_1WxJR0NHqnEG62eSPd5vGcsS_-bxkEGGc_gSTSmd71FY5RtZqUAM-Ffxh47cI-F0K1760zLx3QqpSdqTxsQcvFIri9MiZWzdHsYMgnoDJPBftX7Xmggt9qpbMfqtz8FWMI0L4m8w1Ghk6SXsMBxsLyfW_VjHwt5Fr3XXudQ8_MDgM_Mbzh0taX4HaluBLB69s1rpUh71NhdfluD30tt4w-Dcv11JWl93i97LfrHi5IpVFD6Hphbskh7UdeLi5GNoxnCnEEyuA9Z2yH-02_uK7uu9QUw4Ggrx1HwokR6tpRTMGKH06Fvh38AhwurC405-pZTf1Gc02Arur4jkbQNkfZFhFUCgLzwG5Uj0-kLquXFEhBFRiXHTwjP2NIT_Oj5a9oo449b9HBJp3GaEYzeI6AGUnzXKNHUeoRIhs%3D)

This judge may not have ruled in our favor, but we have faith in the American justice system. It’s not too late to make things right.

[**According to our team, if every one of our supporters can contribute just $10 to Kari Lake’s fight to secure our elections and ensure the disaster that happened in Arizona is NOT repeated, our team will have the funds needed to bring this case to the Supreme Court.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=45e11edd573243d7b2dd616230b1792a&_e=ONp_zaaVBbxRwYnTCqkZD3TCR5gNQh28hVDe7Wnqnz8eAF2hAL9AOv6u1AIHDs_qLIqdgH0TDPDDmRSqV_ZxxxZJjhmOWQaQjE3ATwYsdhzDOV9ZgReHI84Pu3jY5dot38mK2_1WxJR0NHqnEG62eSPd5vGcsS_-bxkEGGc_gSTSmd71FY5RtZqUAM-Ffxh47cI-F0K1760zLx3QqpSdqTxsQcvFIri9MiZWzdHsYMgnoDJPBftX7Xmggt9qpbMfqtz8FWMI0L4m8w1Ghk6SXsMBxsLyfW_VjHwt5Fr3XXudQ8_MDgM_Mbzh0taX4HaluBLB69s1rpUh71NhdfluD30tt4w-Dcv11JWl93i97LdFNmge9fiGQar-xGZPpVojLF0YkQHIoQlzEPBbmRk4SNQXaH-PY4eqFTnlubfCM88fcwDOzeRVq8HY2FnM-V3wWExj7A0q1Xf8fpLYlQ5G4ikQT9NZvASmahMKKw7XB_PMmkHmOQUHGimLjIEioMrWLh1sATXC4XmsgDdD58LAll1vLXbntx7kH1CmLPB3nRM%3D)

This was always just the beginning. We will APPEAL, and we will bring this lawsuit all the way to the steps of the Supreme Court if need be. It’s not too late to make things right. | Best, Team Lake Paid for by Save Arizona Fund Inc. Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f0268223afaa48ceade91b732619260c&_e=V6S6z-P7gn6JTCxEwngPtekuc3qHaImIQB_AxJtXxoRUns_T89VrkyY8LwLRNJW5RsIt1vqFCBV_sLLM94GEaI-DhTtAvHmhK4XMXYczAOgpze_2xlYBxEwNyMGyZ4M1l8dcQmzVgQvLMY-0-EChkVHOQgUj3xIiJPKnj9YpiekJRuCYUgZ-OLR9X75P7m7QzfsMZCttcALBNFkhmp_KWTISbwV1Bs0uQjCIoPSwT0M-mYyLyU3BQSwi61AaBoD62CqgM2Wqy4iV9yMgaa4mN1piv8lYLzQnCca77Zb5LMI%3D)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f0268223afaa48ceade91b732619260c&_e=V6S6z-P7gn6JTCxEwngPtekuc3qHaImIQB_AxJtXxoRUns_T89VrkyY8LwLRNJW5RsIt1vqFCBV_sLLM94GEaI-DhTtAvHmhK4XMXYczAOgpze_2xlYBxEwNyMGyZ4M1l8dcQmzVgQvLMY-0-EChkR6bxphoEdTjzlQI6jN2hj1ZUDRSQQnhf7bQ3N02HUlUAVL-SH0LNso9gzGdzRT5AoMf4ff02cBf9D0SI12dastLQNnmgSqdgkgmByTvu9QDlHj_grWtiAWF6vr0Q38dXma9HXGsAJU6na79XW1N1iY%3D)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f0268223afaa48ceade91b732619260c&_e=V6S6z-P7gn6JTCxEwngPtekuc3qHaImIQB_AxJtXxoRUns_T89VrkyY8LwLRNJW5RsIt1vqFCBV_sLLM94GEaI-DhTtAvHmhK4XMXYczAOgpze_2xlYBxEwNyMGyZ4M1l8dcQmzVgQvLMY-0-EChkTCGWVNTTSxPQEri-Gbgyd2BiWJ3J0a2jKO_cO2OlCiaV9SzEuiEZWrmtxxkhZvbqmqeKEew6OsPY0492wgw5g7Uu7_6AmaqHtcr_g3tcBRNPNRrOFrEYYBIA1XEyrnn88sOVFVa8PxJufJOSwT0jg4%3D)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f0268223afaa48ceade91b732619260c&_e=V6S6z-P7gn6JTCxEwngPtekuc3qHaImIQB_AxJtXxoRUns_T89VrkyY8LwLRNJW5RsIt1vqFCBV_sLLM94GEaI-DhTtAvHmhK4XMXYczAOgpze_2xlYBxEwNyMGyZ4M1l8dcQmzVgQvLMY-0-EChkT9dzJ5UIVrZHf5AxwqMRsMBpyvWnCRxdn6qu2qP-4CaUQlBOWFXBA8MsW76S87vin129ZThqe7NdUoT4GI-OJV3Nz1klQCmgobQ__6eN7exYrvWVkH99PICEOkMObu6aMHvoNwsM1qwaC5J5O50eVk%3D)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f0268223afaa48ceade91b732619260c&_e=V6S6z-P7gn6JTCxEwngPtekuc3qHaImIQB_AxJtXxoRUns_T89VrkyY8LwLRNJW5RsIt1vqFCBV_sLLM94GEaI-DhTtAvHmhK4XMXYczAOgpze_2xlYBxEwNyMGyZ4M1l8dcQmzVgQvLMY-0-EChkTXDLgUTHH1iSY0oUTDgsprS-Hx5PU6N3K6G1_3c-5LgHz9nQco1TVs_onHLprv7vuRN4kNfkU8hIwRJ9XWtQJkoHJN_b84jMfR27AhOW49D7NvclkSjWKEoVXt65u7SCe2jTvj9tg3JnaED6N-cL8o%3D)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f0268223afaa48ceade91b732619260c&_e=V6S6z-P7gn6JTCxEwngPtekuc3qHaImIQB_AxJtXxoRUns_T89VrkyY8LwLRNJW5RsIt1vqFCBV_sLLM94GEaI-DhTtAvHmhK4XMXYczAOgpze_2xlYBxEwNyMGyZ4M1l8dcQmzVgQvLMY-0-EChkS7gYpo02RCycIHGH4gKxUTjN14_mQTSJR2A9nG3Jan3F5PLk9uP3pcvE-G2NdrSCsqT3utqijsBC7KBLC4sOLYenTf0ncFUKVXMJMVcTvULWTm0GiGfcbee2G4409wDji1d-i5oVjJ8WX-KCtKWs94%3D)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f0268223afaa48ceade91b732619260c&_e=V6S6z-P7gn6JTCxEwngPtekuc3qHaImIQB_AxJtXxoRUns_T89VrkyY8LwLRNJW5RsIt1vqFCBV_sLLM94GEaI-DhTtAvHmhK4XMXYczAOgpze_2xlYBxEwNyMGyZ4M1l8dcQmzVgQvLMY-0-EChkVMkrGoS5e_rOX-FW-rtYaqupxjdYn3S8XUPciDBs5Gu3AFPMyAovKcFKUhWnl1evL6BR8118QVTRSYXdTMyMAUMlKuQ8Td1sMECM44NFWPG60cyNooDhfYdaYqk8kYPWPuyEFR5cBpDNlA15N81tEU%3D)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f0268223afaa48ceade91b732619260c&_e=V6S6z-P7gn6JTCxEwngPtekuc3qHaImIQB_AxJtXxoRUns_T89VrkyY8LwLRNJW5RsIt1vqFCBV_sLLM94GEaI-DhTtAvHmhK4XMXYczAOgpze_2xlYBxEwNyMGyZ4M1l8dcQmzVgQvLMY-0-EChkb3wQYkaSbCyRV9EWFw1PzrjhHE2fzFELFJ3tbGC_SoTABp0y-AURo2DiW10NB6wbaUkAR7TFviBgNblNOVlScKNBzG4AHX5QtJxXgGam0xL_LvRgNFe7QCTPD_tSzSODkaBqT04Lk9TvAN4NrWLwG8%3D)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f0268223afaa48ceade91b732619260c&_e=V6S6z-P7gn6JTCxEwngPtekuc3qHaImIQB_AxJtXxoRUns_T89VrkyY8LwLRNJW5RsIt1vqFCBV_sLLM94GEaI-DhTtAvHmhK4XMXYczAOgpze_2xlYBxEwNyMGyZ4M1oXijoakwY2bAVNUP8Kb7x5qp5_YOGy0QZszyZ0BysVI3cRS6SoLRbAIBclfawhe-eBMWlp82W-stV6ipZ5UBMEpHlFaqCr9jZV8873tgIskBnVb3mkLdd9HFzepEtkwH0jKF1kFayZSKhuIxxUbmR8EQrjkHiqQXJvbum2I36Rw%3D)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f0268223afaa48ceade91b732619260c&_e=V6S6z-P7gn6JTCxEwngPtekuc3qHaImIQB_AxJtXxoRUns_T89VrkyY8LwLRNJW5RsIt1vqFCBV_sLLM94GEaI-DhTtAvHmhK4XMXYczAOgpze_2xlYBxEwNyMGyZ4M1qR-8ODfpbTIPPcjavnry8K5RKq1RIJ0SzrTSsUVovU5niQgLmUEVOyuRaly2QYNXJg8Xyd7j9bUHkqv32TAtuaJZxy86wLh68o8k89KlH8r-QLNtVg62dQZlMkL44pcGVomfyV_EMl8h9trqvCEsjLHusO4_FosiMJbsG0FKzDY%3D)

clean_body: Friend, This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation. For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop. In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. Now I 'll share my story... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities. Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking. We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals. This is WRONG. I've dealt with racism... I 've even received death threats. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable. But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up. I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. I am breaking the rules. It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... I 'm not doing that. You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country. So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss). When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing. Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for: School Choice: Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools. The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. Criminal Justice Reform: The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities. Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message. Entrepreneurship: I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire. BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore. The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. This is personal to me. I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: This is my last message to you before you close this email. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation Sent to Conservatives Give subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Alexandra Rojas (via JusticeDemocrats.com)
subject: Thank you.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

I wanted to personally reach out to thank you for your dedication and
support.

We’re in a fight for the soul of the Democratic Party — to transform it to
represent regular people, not corporate special interests. To pass
legislation like Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, a living wage, and
ending our systems of mass incarceration and deportation.

When we started Justice Democrats after Bernie Sanders’ 2016 campaign, we
didn’t know what the future would hold. But we believed — and still do
believe — that people in the country deserve to have representation in
Congress who truly fight for their interests and aren’t beholden to
corporations, the establishment, or big money donors.

Our work is 100% grassroots funded so every contribution really makes a
difference. Thank you so much for your partnership and your support. I’m
looking forward to the work we will do together this next year.

In solidarity,

Alexandra Rojas
Executive Director, Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230101-26825-footer&t=1001&refcode2=26825_1203867_qzPsk9&akid=26825%2E1203867%2EqzPsk9

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1002&akid=26825%2E1203867%2EqzPsk9

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Col. Mike Waltz
subject: It’s all because of you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Waltz for Congress
body:
| | | Peter, 2022 was an incredible year for house conservatives, and it’s all because of you.

With every challenge and every roadblock, true patriots like you rose up to the challenge and helped push our team to success despite all odds. Even when the cards were stacked against us, I knew I could always count on our grassroots team.

There is so much to be done in 2023, but I wanted to take this time to reflect on how much it truly means to me to serve you in Congress. This is not a task I take lightly, and I can’t wait to start working to further our conservative mission in 2023. I am honored to stand on the frontlines with you in this fight for our nation’s future.
---

I hope this email finds you well as we enter the new year. Barbara and I want to wish you a very happy and healthy new year.

As we look back on 2022, I am grateful for the support and encouragement you have given me to continue to represent you in the United States Senate. Your dedication to our shared values and commitment to making a positive impact for generations to come is truly appreciated.

As we start the new year, I look forward to continuing to work hard on your behalf. I work hard to be a strong and effective voice for Iowa and to make a positive difference in the lives of all Americans.

Again, I hope you have a wonderful start to the new year, and I hope you keep in touch in the months ahead.

God bless,

name: Jimmy Panetta
subject: Happy New Year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jimmy Panetta for Congress 2023, FEC ID# C00592154
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56757154/385904898/-2113420158?refcode=JP_EM_ST_WL_20230101_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjM1OTIyMy1mNzg5LWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDIyNDgzMmU2MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nGqaATWg87gwsudzJ42ocBTzyturwHhI2Uc-WcpSB9k=&emci=39e7c9fa-3a7a-ed11-819c-000d3a9eb474&emdi=36359223-f789-ed11-9d7a-00224832e611&ceid=6108787) | Peter,

Happy New Year!

I’m sure that 2023 will be a consequential year for California's new 19th Congressional District.

The results of the recent election demonstrate that over the past year I worked hard to get out and about in the communities of the New 19th. Nevertheless, as we enter into 2023, I don’t plan to slow down and look forward to continuing to meet and serve as many of my constituents as possible.

Furthermore, I will continue my work in the 118th Congress to fight for working families by focusing on legislation that reduces everyday prices and increases investment in affordable housing, homelessness solutions, water resources, agriculture production, technological innovation, and more.

Wishing you a fruitful and fulfilling new year and look forward to seeing you soon.

Jimmy
---

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: All my best to you this new year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
Happy New Year, friend!
As I look to the year ahead, I'm so deeply grateful for you and for this entire grassroots team. Thanks to you, I'm about to begin a full, six-year term in the Senate – and I'm _fired up_ to get to work.

My life's work has always been centered in service, friend, and I can think of no greater platform to _continue_ that service than in the world's greatest deliberative body: our United States Senate. What an honor. Thank you.
There is so much to do to bring the change our country so desperately needs – to ensure everyone can achieve their American dream – and friend, I couldn't be more ready to roll up my sleeves and continue pushing our people-first agenda forward.
I hope you get a moment to slow down and spend time with the people who matter most. Then, together, we'll continue fighting for what matters. All my best wishes to you and your loved ones in 2023.

– Rev. Raphael Warnock
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://action.warnockforgeorgia.com/p/UBjz5MzSPkqVKiEwLzz2KA2?unsubscribedata=8FbssqTRibEMyH%2Fw9WjLp0QYx75D81fIkBY2eXu43DkljtbPmoMPLblxa%2BR9RjTlwnWm6sMHnC22%2BjG4dGbHCK6ar0DeLwY2wut%2B%2Fu6I8UwYXe8sjgL4R%2FrEdRvDr7yv2MESJLc%2B4BQ5b6iehA2Ssc35HzOdtBJwY90F6X0v%2BFz8%2BXAe1M5IR1Pz82wWVNnb5W64I7DhBkzSbtPFsNA0xftst05yKmo4SGOUbOHT6dbcljjoruPWlDBzIPfcEqt8cLze1SjVYk1sw8Ry1tve5d5FZuE4dvZWRsQL59lw3aLd1%2FpdS2nUbm1sGCe1QkZKt5GXXgH%2FDwlxx6Fwy%2BjzWmVmlndZ6x5gHuSJUT03MrmY3RU%2BkT%2F86inuizQQFPTbQ0aRVYwWRlXUNx4nCbWhhNgk9h2S8R2uGkW%2FeDd%2Fzpg%3D) For your reference, any donor history or identification in this message reflects what we have on file for the email address [dpwillis67@gmail.com] to which this message was sent. name: President Jessica Post
subject: A note of gratitude
body:
Plain and simple, we had an incredible year, and your support made our accomplishments possible! | | |
---
| | Thank you, thank you, thank you. Today, on behalf of everyone here at the DLCC, I’d like to thank you for your commitment in 2022. Whether you made a donation or volunteered with one of our incredible candidates, your support made a huge difference, and we’re all deeply grateful. Our work to elect state Democrats isn’t easy – but you’ve been here every step of the way. And together, we were able to defy the odds and do what many said was impossible: **2022 was the first midterm election that the president’s party did not lose a single state legislative chamber since at least 1934 – and we gained _four_ more!** [Thank you so much for being on our team. If you’re able to, a small contribution of $7 would help us greatly in continuing these fights. Can you start 2023 off on the right foot and make your first donation to the DLCC today?](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wllHyGNe2HDyIs5WdLo8tLZFkTvQ_D_sKMPxDAc898PM0X3KI7fSo-uBGmL-fGQczmZKV_XJziMGyxUzIflYIrielGNlwoCiq_mtfZkJqmi6kmZKDJjNxgzIr1akDKuO1dGXOWXn5K2-JvLYlWRYgOQHjoIjVayhePl1ez90SO7wwN0XT2H0TQcuHWL836bJdb3Flmd_t81TuS7o5APyr5j0umyCCUQKgzKPpZGMMZRlkZZM5UYPzshlOy877adY-T2I6J1-g3YO0vIJMa52OFzAhJIKpmg90JyJVZk20kTAIJHsXNrsIIzmx3UiXDA3ldpJet53Lq0nE1clsTO6UFByYXQ0-WavNDV13ND60CoU-u5OS-EQnQ6nIVs9pWz20/3sh/kil5T6t3QsaLXHpqEj-1UA/h0/w9RNcB3vMWFWR9hgzggmBpJlH3r__cDWDhl_0NOv1iE) Thank you for everything. subject: A year for the history books✨🌈🎉
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont, P
body:
Together, we made history by electing Becca to Congress. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56776343/385926287/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODRiYzM1Yi0yNjhhLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDIyNDgzMmU2MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TPt4PHpg_rrHEGqusVtPLwLQrbNCK5RjgTCX886qEtQ=&emci=71e61ddf-5288-ed11-9d7a-00224832e611&emdi=884bc35b-268a-ed11-9d7a-00224832e611&ceid=43402272) | Last year was one for the history books, Peter! **No – seriously!!** Together, we made history by electing Becca to Congress, who will be the first woman and openly-LGBTQ person to represent our state in Washington! None of this would have been possible without your support. Your donations, kind words, volunteer time, and of course – your VOTES – made 2022 one of the biggest years in Vermont history. We are so lucky to have you on our team, and so grateful for everything you put into our campaign over the course of 2022. It means the world to us, and to Becca. **On January 3rd, 2023, Becca will be sworn in to serve her first term in Congress, and this moment will be the culmination of all of YOUR hard work. So thank you again for believing in Becca, in the power of courage and kindness, and in the idea that change IS possible.** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56776344/385926288/1869993778?refcode=E19915-20230101-HappyNewYear-graphic-Holiday-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODRiYzM1Yi0yNjhhLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDIyNDgzMmU2MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TPt4PHpg_rrHEGqusVtPLwLQrbNCK5RjgTCX886qEtQ=)** Happy 2023 ✨ — Team Becca
---

* * *
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56776345/385926289/537668883?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODRiYzM1Yi0yNjhhLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDIyNDgzMmU2MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TPt4PHpg_rrHEGqusVtPLwLQrbNCK5RjgTCX886qEtQ=&emci=71e61ddf-5288-ed11-9d7a-00224832e611&emdi=884bc35b-268a-ed11-9d7a-00224832e611&ceid=43402272) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56776346/385926290/-1209379614?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODRiYzM1Yi0yNjhhLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDIyNDgzMmU2MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TPt4PHpg_rrHEGqusVtPLwLQrbNCK5RjgTCX886qEtQ=&emci=71e61ddf-5288-ed11-9d7a-00224832e611&emdi=884bc35b-268a-ed11-9d7a-00224832e611&ceid=43402272) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56776347/385926291/411952208?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ODRiYzM1Yi0yNjhhLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDIyNDgzMmU2MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TPt4PHpg_rrHEGqusVtPLwLQrbNCK5RjgTCX886qEtQ=&emci=71e61ddf-5288-ed11-9d7a-00224832e611&emdi=884bc35b-268a-ed11-9d7a-00224832e611&ceid=43402272)
**Becca believes the best thoughts are not always from the loudest voices in the room.** As President Pro Tem of the Vermont State Senate, she's led the charge to invest in affordable housing, fight climate change, enshrine reproductive freedom into our state's constitution, and so much more. Now, she's making history as the first woman and openly LGBTQ person to ever serve Vermont in Congress. name: Conservative Liberty Wire
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8bd641af1f3a42dca859822b223beee4&_e=uVTfAD7UO_tXLhb6hkZOy1p2GrbMVRYGZKF3vGhL59buOITbNVKt8I-VoOjz1_cyF0QZRyNjzby4r24VUb70TtEbLraoDh_P9lUkCUBGsKdhL_o6pu-yQNq_ifGmm2p7XsGpHb1BdG3H4QWdyUlfjOdqGZe0elBXlWzdOigOhGNpXE9CULFhsUPTL5mUVFbjlmxe9BefO2ycz7sECFcwfU3jHyeL_6VDh6N9oUhGX9qRMhBAnM6SxiFVQbMEqPD-XinlmrT9wlh7Z9hfzaCMsZvUhXjBpF0fvt0FKJI4LgulAV_NMcKZVQdcDc2L8KtDYPXrJ93rDST0ecXiTlxt9ob2YFiA1WvPvLke0DvYlJtSA96kEzOd4AqQcwDj7gqzVNY_UNl-YssSLty-UY0cOw%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American,
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.
A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.
That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.**
By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.
You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below:
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8bd641af1f3a42dca859822b223beee4&_e=uVTfAD7UO_tXLhb6hkZOy1p2GrbMVRYGZKF3vGhL59buOITbNVKt8I-VoOjz1_cyF0QZRyNjzby4r24VUb70TtEbLraoDh_P9lUkCUBGsKdhL_o6pu-yQNq_ifGmm2p7XsGpHb1BdG3H4QWdyUlfjOdqGZe0elBXlWzdOigOhGNpXE9CULFhsUPTL5mUVFbjlmxe9BefO2ycz7sECFcwfU3jHyeL_6VDh6N9oUhGX9rHs70GWCtcvEmwScwoN9CztrKAh4Ujgjwsu-mUJHfC37YnScx1kEdySbza89d70jO1fnIa8RRlJT96g3t4T-ONinCYM8s9j8qQGCSN75lP6CQHBrcEDbI3lciembqLblpvNro4iyxK_UPhxgsgFOHvwQ16U7lY5Yf5UT5_9qvmRQ%3D%3D)**
For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.
**But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.**
This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.
Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states.
These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College.
**And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.**
So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.
**You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:**
**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8bd641af1f3a42dca859822b223beee4&_e=uVTfAD7UO_tXLhb6hkZOy1p2GrbMVRYGZKF3vGhL59buOITbNVKt8I-VoOjz1_cyF0QZRyNjzby4r24VUb70TtEbLraoDh_P9lUkCUBGsKdhL_o6pu-yQNq_ifGmm2p7XsGpHb1BdG3H4QWdyUlfjOdqGZe0elBXlWzdOigOhGNpXE9CULFhsUPTL5mUVFbjlmxe9BefO2ycz7sECFcwfU3jHyeL_6VDh6N9oUhGX9pV5vR-splBlN8dzk8uvZo75jSCaYazWwVRWSqgai6JFqcnOyELN1J93aIPYmdWw4hID8AgMyrVIk9op_ZcCs4l3QmDFycwSPAUNUd7Zx_VK_d2X0K-IldAzLUpOS2WGxBk3AaqwB70cXPL2cevGE97mRWEsyeXGiM2U7NBeOTHUQ%3D%3D)**
And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.
Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.
Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

clean_body: It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;" Reaching over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. name: Brent Bozell
subject: The Washington Post is falling
body:
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=26ea91d0076c44babe80e8c27d95e22b&_e=TN24A0-l2lMXAHQwCxaZfju3zaIJDgabTIw1zTfF4if7b2XWPd30UFJnSR_KZJwhBgAmmt54JlPtlwuqh_84rCjAclxN4Nlre8aAsWXt0Bw1zljhqovUUHiOJQk6OTF-sB_UrAvYq62Erq44QUCrbGN9J-PFvVmAnqeZ41MZ4NuEO_gunDTffNzIFDf8umo_vS80Mgoe0IsO7-Aa7szN-x2rcBVLJXc1kbJ2rKq2bsCzu88l6gOmwbFRGPuANF6bv9BnbKBl8GAAAkcWAjnNxA%3D%3D)
Friend,

I just read one of the best things of 2022 - _The Washington Pos_ t, which lost 500k subscribers this past year, announced upcoming layoffs.

Do you know what this means, Friend?

**We 're winning!**

My name is Brent Bozell, Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC).

MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing activists pretending to be journalists and stopping them from using the media to push their socialist agenda.

**When the MRC was founded in 1987, over 75% of Americans trusted the media. Since then, MRC has successfully SHATTERED America 's belief in that trust-- over 90% of Americans state they DO NOT trust the left-wing media anymore. **

Now I need you to help us destroy them for good. That's why I've set a goal to raise $7,500 by the end of the week.

[_**Can you help MRC hold the left-wing media accountable for their corruption and lies? Click here to send a gift of $10, $25, $50, or any amount today and**_ _**help us DESTROY the media**_ _** >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=26ea91d0076c44babe80e8c27d95e22b&_e=TN24A0-l2lMXAHQwCxaZfju3zaIJDgabTIw1zTfF4if7b2XWPd30UFJnSR_KZJwhBgAmmt54JlPtlwuqh_84rCjAclxN4Nlre8aAsWXt0Bw1zljhqovUUHiOJQk6OTF-CmCMq4dwzizpcEUmWSnA2xQylIODydAYParqXjPw-2fHSG52pVHXDcFGPjdp9wCXfyyO3v1jU3PqpzwlGrlXAogNC4Urdo_7qPuUm5kj88ff-koUp2nDN74MP9HxCIBNCQyZjdqIr2d-IDgwhScFGQ%3D%3D)

I will not stop my mission until the average voter sees corporate journalists for the traitors they really are.

They've used their power to sway our elections.

**During the 2020 and 2022 elections, the media manipulated MILLIONS of voters through their radical political agenda.**

They refused to give airtime to important arguments of the Republican
campaign -- both pro-Trump and anti-Biden -- and ran a constant stream of negative material on President Trump.

Millions of voters cast their ballots knowing only what the media permitted them to know about the candidates.

**The leftist media have the power to change our elections. And if we don 't stop them, they will do it again!**

[_**Help MRC show voters that corporate journalists are now traitors to America >>>**_](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=26ea91d0076c44babe80e8c27d95e22b&_e=TN24A0-l2lMXAHQwCxaZfju3zaIJDgabTIw1zTfF4if7b2XWPd30UFJnSR_KZJwhBgAmmt54JlPtlwuqh_84rCjAclxN4Nlre8aAsWXt0Bw1zljhqovUUHiOJQk6OTF-ilc24DqE9Ak3dQ6_-rIMEcwqj4-wRhgqXvS7zN5NRcq7S3RaSnrQBeNE0VXAkJJEqTMNg8bP9qU2j51eBeKvg35_LNUxAT2K-eLuukrU3elPWq-gIHfb7sV0rkSkFSMOFCa8qiD7sLx1xqZGwoMzFg%3D%3D)

Here's how MRC exposes the left-wing media:

1. **MRC monitors and clips videos of all news content from major networks, social media accounts, and cable outlets. **

We have over 850,000 hours of video stored on secure servers covering every nightly broadcast and more going back to 1987.

2. **My team and I analyze this content and identify fake news stories, lies, and left-wing media bias. **

3. **MRC 's team exposes these lies by forcing the media to report the story, sharing their reports on social media, and telling the truth. **

The Media Research Center also owns some of the largest social media pages in the conservative movement so that they can share these stories with supporters.

Your generous gift helps us expose the radical leftists who have hijacked the media for their socialist agenda. Click below to donate today.
