name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

| This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=af33505f4aa94e6f8d506bf79590cc6f&_e=bm3d2xS-y-s1h9Fnv9BkOwdKfQOtS9mnwLZPhWNp-XFFBnAiecMjcn-KMHTF2-TZnMfGUD9LU6IRjV8Tj47g5JEbEPkRcL_sag2hdNm0D_JS-hNHUw_1ZF8G1eRBK2iJ687IvwFYcoeM1Z-Eg3ojckO73gTmhAsfUFcrR7Eb7iYlsJl8wW5cyYJtaAZiAViyXib7r3goyVG4BW6gOJ9fu97LobRVM0AOeIgatEGK5njRZ-MVVIx79D4bSjHyKQ4PyNeY9WUsauA8zFsjvSoflO5r2MgDvnxnWT3QWf_SAoFIDHx5m8cYSg0kAYuTNrmDLwZkg_b7R6CA88uJngBrxxhWpSaTuJeY3NGqxQ9CQsOg9LRCO7gE4KfNd5-5Kici2ARn8sGmJSM2-dhTsIgpfN9SHXhwjSc1OlIjnxg6xvVpJJOumDlq7i0vkmkxi-PP)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=af33505f4aa94e6f8d506bf79590cc6f&_e=bm3d2xS-y-s1h9Fnv9BkOwdKfQOtS9mnwLZPhWNp-XFFBnAiecMjcn-KMHTF2-TZnMfGUD9LU6IRjV8Tj47g5JEbEPkRcL_sag2hdNm0D_JS-hNHUw_1ZF8G1eRBK2iJ687IvwFYcoeM1Z-Eg3ojckO73gTmhAsfUFcrR7Eb7iYlsJl8wW5cyYJtaAZiAViyXib7r3goyVG4BW6gOJ9fu97LobRVM0AOeIgatEGK5njRZ-MVVIx79D4bSjHyKQ4PyNeY9WUsauA8zFsjvSoflDzGmi8pol50o_ydfy8JQvdmbOcngGRRq4RB-ovDXOucKCNuylwj4OEiqVXb6MP_yfIDVKYuAg7s_uekvuJJ0UEkCnA9DxBnXJ78kNriFEcsjTKUMkJLtpgTeFcnoH9VjaEq3c1OXq8ZcZxoPrK2p7OsqDNAN9TNKOR9hIJIC--G)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=af33505f4aa94e6f8d506bf79590cc6f&_e=bm3d2xS-y-s1h9Fnv9BkOwdKfQOtS9mnwLZPhWNp-XFFBnAiecMjcn-KMHTF2-TZnMfGUD9LU6IRjV8Tj47g5JEbEPkRcL_sag2hdNm0D_JS-hNHUw_1ZF8G1eRBK2iJ687IvwFYcoeM1Z-Eg3ojckO73gTmhAsfUFcrR7Eb7iYlsJl8wW5cyYJtaAZiAViyXib7r3goyVG4BW6gOJ9fu97LobRVM0AOeIgatEGK5njRZ-MVVIx79D4bSjHyKQ4PyNeY9WUsauA8zFsjvSoflMaUcpo8ml_sn12lKTI7eDrr4a974ShCoxdodUHBBP0cOhG7sV9ow878J7fiOrqlV8HasgMP3SipPwS-nFKyncMt43VpJrfTDle8PZyLeujAR1BGD2A5vUCw8ulFwQEhdKR43L86_yFLRIsAggxG4ictIwZDhmyOHb8uUQQy1HEg)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=af33505f4aa94e6f8d506bf79590cc6f&_e=bm3d2xS-y-s1h9Fnv9BkOwdKfQOtS9mnwLZPhWNp-XFFBnAiecMjcn-KMHTF2-TZnMfGUD9LU6IRjV8Tj47g5JEbEPkRcL_sag2hdNm0D_JS-hNHUw_1ZF8G1eRBK2iJ687IvwFYcoeM1Z-Eg3ojckO73gTmhAsfUFcrR7Eb7iYlsJl8wW5cyYJtaAZiAViyXib7r3goyVG4BW6gOJ9fu97LobRVM0AOeIgatEGK5njRZ-MVVIx79D4bSjHyKQ4PyNeY9WUsauA8zFsjvSoflIV8ZjfRqRvaJTQyrCQ5n60YCT2GeZFZDKcj9OVsJORvLmF9JKtGRFRhSx0OFoB3bggJK-k3tsS0qbSI7vxUXrLBdnShNcsiW0MDlmyx-JqUO6CdL8CSOxUkU_rjCeaJZ4Av_q_n-htuhUhfyiGucNHgVzRBtcD6huZ8pgoLPKfB).

Peter, I’m not going to keep you long, but this is important.

The Socialist Left is watching how we’re going to enter 2023. They think we’re licking our chops because we didn’t Take Back the Senate Majority and because we lost Georgia. We have to start off 2023 with a strong response to show them we’re not backing down.

The biggest thing we can do right now is get a jump start on fundraising while their Hollywood elite backers are ringing in the new year on their private yachts, private islands, and exclusive clubs. [**_That’s why I’m going to ask you today to bring in the new year by donating just $10, $25, or $50._**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=b6155bc1b3884092a44a5a84ff4dd5e5&_e=3wzgUhIbCWZL2HP72PXYnyp3E3c8EjK3ld0Utj0K7aDnnRrbzA2LZuWzezewoS3Znwgd0iQIyMFqko58r06bPoJj_wvoOFD_0iGZ1LRHkAoaoyi_GaLPePtBKkgOd7p7Tw9reirkTc27L4z9padK5cY7X4sXOD_o5L4b0hhTS-W2Szp3Xf5JR32I3iBVMfr2NEKRZc3ETQgGCGkcaMfBIxOokfeyJTUG-RUzrEzA0fECroGIe2A9MgB_VmR8rNVJMIRNwAZwhwZRbJAvSViEJVMm8tbaZu76Cpn_c6idYLay6Doy8VBU5smVYqjEOJhaP6NR7upPHSz2XOMPgk2hr4cgpWKHi9HBFCoC3oJVk4cRIl3a1zIDvOsaynbKDJRG5SW7H0RgmUmFwmKV7PN1ggyZmQkodqdwu76lyyWY7cBI444eCRQ40PQqVPQXS-boRFSQBk0fYtqv29BGVgtNdcUR5HPzYD4y7nk4bXT8pAudn0FLqgndY4kynFllPQ8_PKMpQRQieopmFeS6HECdHVXoOoAL36ZfiD6AHBryc7I%3D)

Your commitment to whatever you’re able to give will go further than you think. We must build a Grassroots army of conservatives to show that we’re not backing down from the WOKE LEFT and we won’t stand for a Socialist Agenda ruining our beautiful country.

[**I HOPE YOU’RE WITH ME TODAY.

clean_body: | Peter, I’m not going to keep you long, but this is important. The Socialist Left is watching how we’re going to enter 2023. They think we’re licking our chops because we didn’t Take Back the Senate Majority and because we lost Georgia. We have to start off 2023 with a strong response to show them we’re not backing down. The biggest thing we can do right now is get a jump start on fundraising while their Hollywood elite backers are ringing in the new year on their private yachts, private islands, and exclusive clubs. | Your commitment to whatever you’re able to give will go further than you think. We must build a Grassroots army of conservatives to show that we’re not backing down from the WOKE LEFT and we won’t stand for a Socialist Agenda ruining our beautiful country. JD Vance Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans. Ohio needs JD Vance. name: =?utf-8?Q?Tanisha=20M.=20Sullivan?=
subject: Happy New Year!!
body:
Ushering in 2023 I am filled with gratitude. | | | |
---
| | | Dear friend, I cannot thank you enough for being an important part of our 2022 mission. Thank you for entrusting me with your hopes, fears, frustrations, and beliefs in something greater. Thank you for believing in my hope and vision of a stronger more vibrant and expansive democracy. One in which the Commonwealth truly is a beacon - reflecting the promise of our country.

Over the past few months I've had the opportunity to reflect on so much of what I heard, saw, and learned from residents across Massachusetts. Speeches, video clips, photos, democracy roundtables...backyards, parks and living rooms, I am determined not to forget. To that end, I commit to doing my part...and to do what I can to help you with your part...to ensure our **_Common_** wealth is truly living up to her promise for all of us.

As we settle into the new beginnings of 2023, the upcoming MLK weekend will lead into the one year anniversary of our historic campaign launch. As we collectively recommit to work toward justice and opportunity for all, I am honored to have been invited to speak in several communities across the Commonwealth. The remarks I am preparing for each program are informed in part by our journey together, and the legacy that Rev. Dr. King left for us...the Beloved Community. I cannot think of a better way to close one chapter on this journey and begin another than to invite you to join me during MLK weekend. Most of the programs are free and all are open to the public, please check the host websites for more information:

**January 13, 2023**
**Boston**
Shabbat Tzedek (keynote)
Temple Israel
477 Longwood Ave
Boston, MA
6:00 pm

[https://www.tisrael.org/adult-engagement/justice-compassion/shabbat-tzedek-5783/](https://TanishaSullivan.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=85e18e2f1de926628891a3dbe&id=166158d93b&e=dc6a14721a)

____________________________________________________________
**January 16, 2023**
**Acton** (MetroWest)
21st Annual MLK gathering (keynote)
Congregation Beth Elohim
133 Prospect Street
Acton, MA
8:15 am

[https://www.bethelohim.org](https://TanishaSullivan.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=85e18e2f1de926628891a3dbe&id=de15bfbbf7&e=dc6a14721a)

____________________________________________________________
**January 16, 2023
Boston**
53rd Annual MLK Memorial Breakfast Reclaiming our Rights: Education & Activism (Closing speaker)
St. Cyprian’s Church and Union United Methodist Church
Boston Convention & Exhibition Center
Congress Street, Boston
9:00 am

[https://bostonmlkbreakfast.org/breakfast-2023/](https://TanishaSullivan.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=85e18e2f1de926628891a3dbe&id=9cd332ee4b&e=dc6a14721a)

____________________________________________________________
**January 16, 2023
Attleboro **(South of Boston)
36th Annual MLK Memorial program
Unblock the vote: Lifting Barriers to Access (keynote)
Interfaith Service at Second Congregational Church
50 Park Street
Attleboro, MA
2:00 pm

Https://MLKGreaterAttleboro.org

____________________________________________________________
**January 16, 2023
Arlington **(Greater Boston)
35th Annual MLK Observance (keynote)
Arlington Town Hall
730 Massachusetts Ave
Arlington, MA
6:30 pm

[https://www.yourarlington.com/arlington-archives/town-school/town-news/mlk-23.html](https://TanishaSullivan.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=85e18e2f1de926628891a3dbe&id=e2ceb94592&e=dc6a14721a)

My very best,

As we collectively recommit to work toward justice and opportunity for all, I am honored to have been invited to speak in several communities across the Commonwealth. The remarks I am preparing for each program are informed in part by our journey together, and the legacy that Rev. Dr. King left for us...the Beloved Community. I cannot think of a better way to close one chapter on this journey and begin another than to invite you to join me during MLK weekend. Most of the programs are free and all are open to the public, please check the host websites for more information: January 13, 2023 Boston Shabbat Tzedek (keynote) Temple Israel 477 Longwood Ave Boston, MA 6:00 pm January 16, 2023 Acton (MetroWest) 21st Annual MLK gathering (keynote) Congregation Beth Elohim 133 Prospect Street Acton, MA 8:15 am January 16, 2023 Boston 53rd Annual MLK Memorial Breakfast Reclaiming our Rights: Education & Activism (Closing speaker) St. Cyprian’s Church and Union United Methodist Church Boston Convention & Exhibition Center Congress Street, Boston 9:00 am January 16, 2023 Attleboro (South of Boston) 36th Annual MLK Memorial program Unblock the vote: Lifting Barriers to Access (keynote) Interfaith Service at Second Congregational Church 50 Park Street Attleboro, MA 2:00 pm Https://MLKGreaterAttleboro.org January 16, 2023 Arlington (Greater Boston) 35th Annual MLK Observance (keynote) Arlington Town Hall 730 Massachusetts Ave Arlington, MA 6:30 pm My very best, | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2023 CTE Tanisha M. Sullivan, All rights reserved._

name: Cristen Wohlgemuth
subject: Feeling deflated by election results?
body:
I’m asking because I’ve heard from many conservatives who are dismayed about the recent elections, | | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=30d95e06407c47b88dd3e4b1f9a99f65&_e=ArQsu0TqPK7CFxsGrThZ4abF41d--G9lSpgVBBb2lyrFs3wwNqfo0nccAAFN11LOxh_3P9t3HmbYlKUic9I6grn7Gqe-6PhB2HvM8tR1UlNkNVMM_-DN9jPXen8Ok0qH17_jtiDL93GKTdPg6dZvNPlSQy5w4XxWoBjYMLC4TCCtIDkSWsZOaTxouIEe3L88UvhsAMYb-Xa7wcFFhfOxd5aq_xFkibFLbWXtuiFVkEQbDJKPQ2BXzDPPnVMXC_EWasL3l963ZCihRJifnOa36Qis0fGGAnpVZpnQKDCvQHrVAv9ItNvWWB57W9WSqcmAinAPzHtwi6MgV6ZgAQ_dxg%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend of Liberty, How do you feel about the recent election results? I'm asking because I've heard from many conservatives who are dismayed about the recent elections, having hoped for a wave election that could win both houses of Congress. Now, with a divided legislature, we most likely face two years of gridlock. But that doesn't paint the entire picture. Constitutional conservatives like you and I can win victories against the Biden administration right now. **The place we can win right now is in the courts.** That's where, in the last year, our attorneys are winning battles against the Biden administration's attempts to redefine the definition of a firearm, to force pronoun usage in public schools, and to unlawfully tell private landowners what they can and cannot do with their land. The court system is the ultimate safeguard of our constitutional rights. The court system is designed to ensure that the government does not overstep the boundaries of its powers and is held accountable for its actions. **It is essential that we continue to fight to uphold the Constitution and protect our rights, especially since we face unprecedented times as we head into 2023.** Our attorneys are leading the fight to restore and protect your rights against an insatiable, overreaching government. Our attorneys litigate crucial cases at no legal cost to our clients to defend their freedoms. And when we win, you win. If you are frustrated with the state of government in DC, I'd like to ask for your support of our attorneys in courthouses across the western United States. That's where they fight battles to defend your right to own a gun, own land, and speak freely. [**Would you help fund these attorneys, who work countless hours on behalf of our brave clients who are standing up against the Biden administration?**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=30d95e06407c47b88dd3e4b1f9a99f65&_e=ArQsu0TqPK7CFxsGrThZ4abF41d--G9lSpgVBBb2lyrFs3wwNqfo0nccAAFN11LOxh_3P9t3HmbYlKUic9I6grn7Gqe-6PhB2HvM8tR1UlNkNVMM_-DN9jPXen8Ok0qH17_jtiDL93GKTdPg6dZvNPlSQy5w4XxWoBjYMLC4TCCtIDkSWsZOaTxouIEe3L88spchU2k4amCo_gbYZ1Qr1UJOA7wgQRdGSYQE7jE6xnfBlGAOAFYE2PN7KZTzhrS2iBbrnFiHlIufmeod3Q2M6sFmEiCG8_HECX4WiPkyoWsuuRKbwZCtUcgvlKYhVpXwi0U0k5Agkg5HhVkx3Emvrg%3D%3D) **Your gift of $25, $50, or even $250 today** can fund an attorney who can WIN battles to defend your Constitutional rights. [**Will you contribute to these efforts by making a gift today?**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=30d95e06407c47b88dd3e4b1f9a99f65&_e=ArQsu0TqPK7CFxsGrThZ4abF41d--G9lSpgVBBb2lyrFs3wwNqfo0nccAAFN11LOxh_3P9t3HmbYlKUic9I6grn7Gqe-6PhB2HvM8tR1UlNkNVMM_-DN9jPXen8Ok0qH17_jtiDL93GKTdPg6dZvNPlSQy5w4XxWoBjYMLC4TCCtIDkSWsZOaTxouIEe3L88EKYe3JmahkYoZhietS4HkGmBAH3ph8jryZEdtm9glsJrhSYLwhJ5IZnU9M_KCu2YJd9AL_wiKZD1cSLJlUf4kZkzFC8bH1k2kVL7blBBNjVKz73NvdQo5a-ROZk9oJNb5uEEZmJeAkL12pGkNrOdgQ%3D%3D) Here's the secure link where you can donate to protect your constitutional rights: **[https://mslegal.org/donate/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=30d95e06407c47b88dd3e4b1f9a99f65&_e=ArQsu0TqPK7CFxsGrThZ4abF41d--G9lSpgVBBb2lyrFs3wwNqfo0nccAAFN11LOxh_3P9t3HmbYlKUic9I6grn7Gqe-6PhB2HvM8tR1UlNkNVMM_-DN9jPXen8Ok0qH17_jtiDL93GKTdPg6dZvNPlSQy5w4XxWoBjYMLC4TCCtIDkSWsZOaTxouIEe3L88JWsHaO8mA3niYfQJlBj9sshEcmwI3aAgZAwgBCzsZF33JpFgwROaxp70k7ivTr1YeqKB6eMVftmallEDJzEcYgqvgWw51zbiqeCFWN_5Gypno6aZaURC_rExVIy6f16omk4QsVvtVQzVaKGMNrEnwg%3D%3D)** Your gift will secure a victory to tell the government not to trample on our individual rights, and will show support to your fellow brave Americans who are fighting every day to ensure your liberties are kept intact. For Liberty! Cristen Wohlgemuth President & CEO Mountain States Legal Foundation

name: Roger Stone
subject: Roger Stone Releases His 14th Annual International Best & Worst Dressed List
body:
| |
---
**SWANK - ROGER STONE RELEASES HIS 14TH ANNUAL INTERNATIONAL BEST & WORST DRESSED LIST ON NEW YEAR'S DAY** [****](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=w738qdf8nom1rae862&linkid=0&link=9388fe766c714dc0a2c7091ec4ba1202)
---
| Roger Stone, the longtime Republican strategist and publisher of StoneZONE.com, will release his **14th Annual International Best & Worst Dressed List** on New Year's Day. Stone adopted the tradition from the late [Mr. Blackwell](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=w738qdf8nom1rae862&linkid=1&link=fda6826dfd0a43de947541d81d6fd237) who famously published such a list every year, and Stone has released his **Best & Worst Dressed List** on New Year's Day for 13 years. There was no **List** released in 2020 because he was restricted by a gag order from a federal judge. Stone was granted a pardon for his conviction by Special Counsel Robert Mueller. On November 3rd, 2020, the U.S. Department of Justice was forced by federal court order to release the last remaining long-redacted sections of their final Report- in which Mueller could not sugarcoat that he had found "no factual evidence" against Stone regarding "Russian collusion," WikiLeaks collaboration, or the phishing of John Podesta's e-mails. The judge withheld this section of Mueller's final Report from Stone's defense attorneys at trial. There was also no **List** published in 2021 because Roger Stone's wife of 31 years, Nydia Bertran de Espinosa Stone, was diagnosed with stage 4 cancer. With Mrs. Stone's cancer in remission, Stone has returned to publish his "**International Best & Worst Dressed List**" for 2022! **The List will be unveiled in a special Twitter Space at 8:00 P.M. EST on New Year 's Day, January 1st, 2023.** Roger Stone's Twitter account was reinstated by Elon Musk and Stone's comments on politics, news, history, style, food, and culture, as well as sartorial matters, can be seen at @RogerJStoneJr. The full list and photographs will also be published at Roger Stone's new Substack at [https://substack.com/profile/114002229-roger-stone](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=w738qdf8nom1rae862&linkid=2&link=c77709a53659417fac16b9a7ef583f92) Stone's list has traditionally been nonpartisan, nonpolitical, and non ideological. The late Senator **Ted Kennedy** and disgraced New York Governor **Elliot Spitzer** , both made Stone's Best Dressed List in previous years. In previous years, Stone's Worst List has included **Jesse Ventura** and **Steve Bannon**. This year's List is rumored to include Italian Prime Minister **Giorgia Meloni**, former First Lady **Melania Trump** leading the Best Dressed List and Senator-elect **John Fetterman** and **Samuel Bankman-Fried** making the Worst Dressed List. **Roger Stone will breakdown the List and talk about the selection process Monday night, January 2nd at 5:00 P.M. EST on [StoneZONE.LIVE](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=w738qdf8nom1rae862&linkid=3&link=d0893f3439eb482caf9f2b8179109923)**

clean_body: | | SWANK - ROGER STONE RELEASES HIS 14TH ANNUAL INTERNATIONAL BEST & WORST DRESSED LIST ON NEW YEAR'S DAY | Roger Stone, the longtime Republican strategist and publisher of StoneZONE.com, will release his 14th Annual International Best & Worst Dressed List on New Year's Day. Stone adopted the tradition from the late who famously published such a list every year, and Stone has released his Best & Worst Dressed List on New Year's Day for 13 years. There was no List released in 2020 because he was restricted by a gag order from a federal judge. Stone was granted a pardon for his conviction by Special Counsel Robert Mueller. On November 3rd, 2020, the U.S. Department of Justice was forced by federal court order to release the last remaining long-redacted sections of their final Report- in which Mueller could not sugarcoat that he had found "no factual evidence" against Stone regarding "Russian collusion," WikiLeaks collaboration, or the phishing of John Podesta's e-mails. The judge withheld this section of Mueller's final Report from Stone's defense attorneys at trial. There was also no List published in 2021 because Roger Stone's wife of 31 years, Nydia Bertran de Espinosa Stone, was diagnosed with stage 4 cancer. With Mrs. Stone's cancer in remission, Stone has returned to publish his "International Best & Worst Dressed List" for 2022! The List will be unveiled in a special Twitter Space at 8:00 P.M. EST on New Year 's Day, January 1st, 2023. Roger Stone's Twitter account was reinstated by Elon Musk and Stone's comments on politics, news, history, style, food, and culture, as well as sartorial matters, can be seen at @RogerJStoneJr. The full list and photographs will also be published at Roger Stone's new Substack at Stone's list has traditionally been nonpartisan, nonpolitical, and non ideological. The late Senator Ted Kennedy and disgraced New York Governor Elliot Spitzer , both made Stone's Best Dressed List in previous years. In previous years, Stone's Worst List has included Jesse Ventura and Steve Bannon. This year's List is rumored to include Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni, former First Lady Melania Trump leading the Best Dressed List and Senator-elect John Fetterman and Samuel Bankman-Fried making the Worst Dressed List. Roger Stone will breakdown the List and talk about the selection process Monday night, January 2nd at 5:00 P.M. EST on | ] ] ] ] Email Marketing by [ [DirectIQ ] ](=)
